        rw [List.getElem_append_right] <;> simp [hys]
      simp_rw [SKI.Polynomial.eval, Fin.getElem_fin, hi, this]
      exact MRed.I _

statement:
theorem Polynomial.toSKI_correct {n : Nat} (Γ : SKI.Polynomial n) (xs : List SKI)
    (hxs : xs.length = n) : Γ.toSKI.applyList xs ↠ Γ.eval xs hxs :=
proof_text:
by
  match n with
  | 0 =>
    rw [List.length_eq_zero_iff] at hxs
    simp_rw [hxs, applyList, List.foldl_nil]
    rfl
  | n+1 =>
    have : xs ≠ [] := List.ne_nil_of_length_eq_add_one hxs
    let h : xs = [] ∨ ∃ (l' : List SKI), ∃ (b : SKI), xs = l'.concat b :=
      List.eq_nil_or_concat xs
    simp_rw [this, false_or, List.concat_eq_append] at h
    replace ⟨ys, z, h⟩ := h
    have : ys.length = n := by
      replace h := congr_arg List.length h
      simp_rw [List.length_append, List.length_singleton, hxs] at h
      exact Nat.succ_inj.mp h.symm
    simp_rw [h, applyList_concat]
    trans Γ.elimVar.eval ys this ⬝ z
    · apply MRed.head
      exact SKI.Polynomial.toSKI_correct Γ.elimVar ys this
    · exact SKI.Polynomial.elimVar_correct Γ this z

statement: theorem R_def (x y : SKI) : (R ⬝ x ⬝ y) ↠ y ⬝ x :=
proof_text: RPoly.toSKI_correct [x, y] (by simp)

statement: theorem B_def (f g x : SKI) : (B ⬝ f ⬝ g ⬝ x) ↠ f ⬝ (g ⬝ x) :=
proof_text: BPoly.toSKI_correct [f, g, x] (by simp)

statement: lemma B_tail_mred (f g x y : SKI) (h : (g ⬝ x) ↠ y) : (B ⬝ f ⬝ g ⬝ x) ↠ f ⬝ y :=
proof_text: Trans.trans (B_def f g x) (MRed.tail f h)

statement: theorem C_def (f x y : SKI) : (C ⬝ f ⬝ x ⬝ y) ↠ f ⬝ y ⬝ x :=
proof_text: CPoly.toSKI_correct [f, x, y] (by simp)

statement: lemma C_head_mred (f x y z : SKI) (h : (f ⬝ y) ↠ z) : (C ⬝ f ⬝ x ⬝ y) ↠ z ⬝ x :=
proof_text: Trans.trans (C_def f x y) (MRed.head x h)

statement: theorem rotR_def (x y z : SKI) : (RotR ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ z) ↠ z ⬝ x ⬝ y :=
proof_text: RotRPoly.toSKI_correct [x, y, z] (by simp)

statement: theorem rotL_def (x y z : SKI) : (RotL ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ z) ↠ y ⬝ z ⬝ x :=
proof_text: RotLPoly.toSKI_correct [x, y, z] (by simp)

statement: theorem del_def (x : SKI) : (Del ⬝ x) ↠ x ⬝ x :=
proof_text: DelPoly.toSKI_correct [x] (by simp)

statement: theorem H_def (f x : SKI) : (H ⬝ f ⬝ x) ↠ f ⬝ (x ⬝ x) :=
proof_text: HPoly.toSKI_correct [f, x] (by simp)

statement: theorem Y_def (f : SKI) : (Y ⬝ f) ↠ H ⬝ f ⬝ (H ⬝ f) :=
proof_text: YPoly.toSKI_correct [f] (by simp)

statement: theorem Y_correct (f : SKI) : MJoin Red (Y ⬝ f) (f ⬝ (Y ⬝ f)) :=
proof_text:
by
  use f ⬝ (H ⬝ f ⬝ (H ⬝ f))
  constructor
  · exact Trans.trans (Y_def f) (H_def f (H ⬝ f))
  · apply MRed.tail
    exact Y_def f

statement: theorem fixedPoint_correct (f : SKI) : f.fixedPoint ↠ f ⬝ f.fixedPoint :=
proof_text: H_def f (H ⬝ f)

statement: theorem ThAux_def (x y : SKI) : (ThAux ⬝ x ⬝ y) ↠ y ⬝ (x ⬝ x ⬝ y) :=
proof_text: ThAuxPoly.toSKI_correct [x, y] (by simp)

statement: theorem Th_correct (f : SKI) : (Th ⬝ f) ↠ f ⬝ (Th ⬝ f) :=
proof_text: ThAux_def ThAux f

statement:
theorem isBool_trans (u : Bool) (a a' : SKI) (h : a ↠ a') (ha' : IsBool u a') :
    IsBool u a :=
proof_text:
by
  intro x y
  trans a' ⬝ x ⬝ y
  · apply MRed.head
    apply MRed.head
    exact h
  · exact ha' x y

statement: theorem TT_correct : IsBool true TT :=
proof_text: fun x y ↦ MRed.K x y

statement: theorem FF_correct : IsBool false FF :=
proof_text:
fun x y ↦ calc
    (FF ⬝ x ⬝ y) ↠ I ⬝ y := by apply Relation.ReflTransGen.single; apply red_head; exact red_K I x
    _         ⭢ y := red_I y

statement:
theorem cond_correct (a x y : SKI) (u : Bool) (h : IsBool u a) :
    (SKI.Cond ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ a) ↠ if u then x else y :=
proof_text:
by
  trans a ⬝ x ⬝ y
  · exact rotR_def x y a
  · exact h x y

statement: theorem neg_correct (a : SKI) (ua : Bool) (h : IsBool ua a) : IsBool (¬ ua) (SKI.Neg ⬝ a) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isBool_trans (a' := if ua then FF else TT)
  · apply cond_correct (h := h)
  · cases ua
    · simp [TT_correct]
    · simp [FF_correct]

statement: theorem and_def (a b : SKI) : (SKI.And ⬝ a ⬝ b) ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ (SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ FF ⬝ b) ⬝ FF ⬝ a :=
proof_text: AndPoly.toSKI_correct [a, b] (by simp)

statement:
theorem and_correct (a b : SKI) (ua ub : Bool) (ha : IsBool ua a) (hb : IsBool ub b) :
    IsBool (ua && ub) (SKI.And ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isBool_trans (a' := SKI.Cond ⬝ (SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ FF ⬝ b) ⬝ FF ⬝ a) (h := and_def _ _)
  cases ua
  · simp_rw [Bool.false_and] at ⊢
    apply isBool_trans (a' := FF) (ha' := FF_correct) (h := cond_correct a _ _ false ha)
  · simp_rw [Bool.true_and] at ⊢
    apply isBool_trans (a' := SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ FF ⬝ b) (h := cond_correct a _ _ true ha)
    apply isBool_trans (a' := if ub = true then TT else FF) (h := cond_correct b _ _ ub hb)
    cases ub
    · simp [FF_correct]
    · simp [TT_correct]

statement: theorem or_def (a b : SKI) : (SKI.Or ⬝ a ⬝ b) ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ (SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ FF ⬝ b) ⬝ a :=
proof_text: OrPoly.toSKI_correct [a, b] (by simp)

statement:
theorem or_correct (a b : SKI) (ua ub : Bool) (ha : IsBool ua a) (hb : IsBool ub b) :
  IsBool (ua || ub) (SKI.Or ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isBool_trans (a' := SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ (SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ FF ⬝ b) ⬝ a) (h := or_def _ _)
  cases ua
  · simp_rw [Bool.false_or]
    apply isBool_trans (a' := SKI.Cond ⬝ TT ⬝ FF ⬝ b) (h := cond_correct a _ _ false ha)
    apply isBool_trans (a' := if ub = true then TT else FF) (h := cond_correct b _ _ ub hb)
    cases ub
    · simp [FF_correct]
    · simp [TT_correct]
  · apply isBool_trans (a' := TT) (h := cond_correct a _ _ true ha)
    simp [TT_correct]

statement: theorem fst_correct (a b : SKI) : (Fst ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ a ⬝ b)) ↠ a :=
proof_text:
by calc
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ a ⬝ b ⬝ TT := R_def _ _
  _ ↠ a := cond_correct TT a b true TT_correct

statement: theorem snd_correct (a b : SKI) : (Snd ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ a ⬝ b)) ↠ b :=
proof_text:
by calc
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ a ⬝ b ⬝ FF := R_def _ _
  _ ↠ b := cond_correct FF a b false FF_correct

statement: theorem unpaired_def (f p : SKI) : (SKI.Unpaired ⬝ f ⬝ p) ↠ f ⬝ (Fst ⬝ p) ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p) :=
proof_text: UnpairedPoly.toSKI_correct [f, p] (by simp)

statement: theorem unpaired_correct (f x y : SKI) : (SKI.Unpaired ⬝ f ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ x ⬝ y)) ↠ f ⬝ x ⬝ y :=
proof_text:
by
  trans f ⬝ (Fst ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ x ⬝ y)) ⬝ (Snd ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ x ⬝ y))
  · exact unpaired_def f _
  · apply parallel_mRed
    · apply MRed.tail
      exact fst_correct _ _
    · exact snd_correct _ _

statement: theorem pair_def (f g x : SKI) : (SKI.Pair ⬝ f ⬝ g ⬝ x) ↠ MkPair ⬝ (f ⬝ x) ⬝ (g ⬝ x) :=
proof_text: PairPoly.toSKI_correct [f, g, x] (by simp)

statement: theorem mRed_of_parallelReduction {a a' : SKI} (h : a ⭢ₚ a') : a ↠ a' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  case refl => exact Relation.ReflTransGen.refl
  case par a a' b b' ha hb =>
    apply parallel_mRed
    · exact mRed_of_parallelReduction ha
    · exact mRed_of_parallelReduction hb
  case red_I => exact Relation.ReflTransGen.single (red_I a')
  case red_K b => exact Relation.ReflTransGen.single (red_K a' b)
  case red_S a b c => exact Relation.ReflTransGen.single (red_S a b c)

statement: theorem parallelReduction_of_red {a a' : SKI} (h : a ⭢ a') : a ⭢ₚ a' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  case red_S => apply ParallelReduction.red_S
  case red_K => apply ParallelReduction.red_K
  case red_I => apply ParallelReduction.red_I
  case red_head a a' b h =>
    apply ParallelReduction.par
    · exact parallelReduction_of_red h
    · exact ParallelReduction.refl b
  case red_tail a b b' h =>
    apply ParallelReduction.par
    · exact ParallelReduction.refl a
    · exact parallelReduction_of_red h

statement:
theorem reflTransGen_parallelReduction_mRed :
    ReflTransGen ParallelReduction = ReflTransGen Red :=
proof_text:
by
  ext a b
  constructor
  · apply Relation.reflTransGen_of_isTrans_reflexive
    exact @mRed_of_parallelReduction
  · apply Relation.reflTransGen_of_isTrans_reflexive
    exact fun a a' h => Relation.ReflTransGen.single (parallelReduction_of_red h)

statement: lemma I_irreducible (a : SKI) (h : I ⭢ₚ a) : a = I :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  rfl

statement: lemma K_irreducible (a : SKI) (h : K ⭢ₚ a) : a = K :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  rfl

statement: lemma Ka_irreducible (a c : SKI) (h : (K ⬝ a) ⭢ₚ c) : ∃ a', a ⭢ₚ a' ∧ c = K ⬝ a' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  case refl => use a, .refl a
  case par b a' h h' => rw [K_irreducible b h]; use a'

statement: lemma S_irreducible (a : SKI) (h : S ⭢ₚ a) : a = S :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  rfl

statement: lemma Sa_irreducible (a c : SKI) (h : (S ⬝ a) ⭢ₚ c) : ∃ a', a ⭢ₚ a' ∧ c = S ⬝ a' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  case refl =>
    exact ⟨a, ParallelReduction.refl a, rfl⟩
  case par b a' h h' => rw [S_irreducible b h]; use a'

statement:
lemma Sab_irreducible (a b c : SKI) (h : (S ⬝ a ⬝ b) ⭢ₚ c) :
    ∃ a' b', a ⭢ₚ a' ∧ b ⭢ₚ b' ∧ c = S ⬝ a' ⬝ b' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases h
  case refl => use a, b, .refl a, .refl b
  case par c b' hc hb =>
    let ⟨d, hd⟩ := Sa_irreducible a c hc
    rw [hd.2]
    use d, b', hd.1

statement: theorem parallelReduction_diamond : Diamond ParallelReduction :=
proof_text:
by
  intro a a₁ a₂ h₁ h₂
  cases h₁
  case refl => exact ⟨a₂, h₂, .refl a₂⟩
  case par a a' b b' ha' hb' =>
    cases h₂
    case refl =>
      use a' ⬝ b'
      exact ⟨.refl (a' ⬝ b'), .par ha' hb'⟩
    case par a'' b'' ha'' hb'' =>
      let ⟨a₃, ha⟩ := parallelReduction_diamond ha' ha''
      let ⟨b₃, hb⟩ := parallelReduction_diamond hb' hb''
      use a₃ ⬝ b₃
      constructor
      · exact .par ha.1 hb.1
      · exact .par ha.2 hb.2
    case red_I =>
      rw [I_irreducible a' ha']
      use b', .red_I b'
    case red_K =>
      let ⟨a₂', ha₂'⟩ := Ka_irreducible a₂ a' ha'
      rw [ha₂'.2]
      use a₂'
      exact ⟨.red_K a₂' b', ha₂'.1⟩
    case red_S a c =>
      let ⟨a'', c', h⟩ := Sab_irreducible a c a' ha'
      rw [h.2.2]
      use a'' ⬝ b' ⬝ (c' ⬝ b'), .red_S a'' c' b'
      apply ParallelReduction.par <;>
        apply ParallelReduction.par <;>
        grind
  case red_I =>
    cases h₂
    case refl => use a₁; exact ⟨.refl a₁, .red_I a₁⟩
    case par c a₁' hc ha =>
      rw [I_irreducible c hc]
      use a₁'
      exact ⟨ha, .red_I a₁'⟩
    case red_I => use a₁; exact ⟨.refl a₁, .refl a₁⟩
  case red_K c =>
    cases h₂
    case refl => use a₁; exact ⟨.refl a₁, .red_K a₁ c⟩
    case par a' c' ha hc =>
      let ⟨a₁', h'⟩ := Ka_irreducible a₁ a' ha
      rw [h'.2]
      use a₁'
      exact ⟨h'.1, .red_K a₁' c'⟩
    case red_K =>
      use a₁; exact ⟨.refl a₁, .refl a₁⟩
  case red_S a b c =>
    cases h₂
    case refl =>
      use a ⬝ c ⬝ (b ⬝ c)
      exact ⟨.refl _, .red_S ..⟩
    case par d c' hd hc =>
      let ⟨a', b', h⟩ := Sab_irreducible a b d hd
      rw [h.2.2]
      use a' ⬝ c' ⬝ (b' ⬝ c')
      constructor
      · apply ParallelReduction.par
        · exact .par h.left hc
        · exact .par h.2.1 hc
      · exact .red_S ..
    case red_S => exact ⟨a ⬝ c ⬝ (b ⬝ c), .refl _, .refl _,⟩

statement:
theorem join_parallelReduction_equivalence :
    Equivalence (MJoin ParallelReduction) :=
proof_text: Confluent.equivalence_join_reflTransGen <| Diamond.toConfluent parallelReduction_diamond

statement: theorem mJoin_red_equivalence : Equivalence (MJoin Red) :=
proof_text:
by
  rw [MJoin, ←reflTransGen_parallelReduction_mRed]
  exact join_parallelReduction_equivalence

statement: theorem MRed.diamond : Confluent Red :=
proof_text:
by
  intro a b c hab hac
  apply mJoin_red_equivalence.trans (y := a)
  · exact mJoin_red_equivalence.symm (MJoin.single hab)
  · exact MJoin.single hac

statement:
lemma applyList_concat (f : SKI) (ys : List SKI) (z : SKI) :
    f.applyList (ys ++ [z]) = f.applyList ys ⬝ z :=
proof_text:
by
  simp [applyList]

statement: lemma Red.ne {x y : SKI} : (x ⭢ y) → x ≠ y
proof_text:
| red_S _ _ _, h => by cases h
  | red_K _ _, h => by cases h
  | red_I _, h => by cases h
  | red_head _ _ _ h', h => Red.ne h' (SKI.app.inj h).1
  | red_tail _ _ _ h', h => Red.ne h' (SKI.app.inj h).2

statement: theorem MRed.S (x y z : SKI) : (S ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ z) ↠ (x ⬝ z ⬝ (y ⬝ z)) :=
proof_text: .single <| red_S ..

statement: theorem MRed.K (x y : SKI) : (K ⬝ x ⬝ y) ↠ x :=
proof_text: .single <| red_K ..

statement: theorem MRed.I (x : SKI) : (I ⬝ x) ↠ x :=
proof_text: .single <| red_I ..

statement: theorem MRed.head {a a' : SKI} (b : SKI) (h : a ↠ a') : (a ⬝ b) ↠ (a' ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction h <;> grind

statement: theorem MRed.tail (a : SKI) {b b' : SKI} (h : b ↠ b') : (a ⬝ b) ↠ (a ⬝ b') :=
proof_text:
by
  induction h <;> grind

statement:
lemma parallel_mRed {a a' b b' : SKI} (ha : a ↠ a') (hb : b ↠ b') :
    (a ⬝ b) ↠ (a' ⬝ b') :=
proof_text: Trans.simple (MRed.head b ha) (MRed.tail a' hb)

statement: lemma parallel_red {a a' b b' : SKI} (ha : a ⭢ a') (hb : b ⭢ b') : (a ⬝ b) ↠ (a' ⬝ b') :=
proof_text:
by
  trans a' ⬝ b <;> grind

statement: theorem mJoin_red_head {x x' : SKI} (y : SKI) : MJoin Red x x' → MJoin Red (x ⬝ y) (x' ⬝ y)
proof_text: | ⟨z, hz, hz'⟩ => ⟨z ⬝ y, MRed.head y hz, MRed.head y hz'⟩

statement: theorem mJoin_red_tail (x : SKI) {y y' : SKI} : MJoin Red y y' → MJoin Red (x ⬝ y) (x ⬝ y')
proof_text: | ⟨z, hz, hz'⟩ => ⟨x ⬝ z, MRed.tail x hz, MRed.tail x hz'⟩

statement: theorem evalStep_right_correct : (x y : SKI) → (x.evalStep = Sum.inr y) → x ⭢ y
proof_text:
| S ⬝ x, a, h =>
    match hx : x.evalStep with
    | Sum.inl _ => by simp only [hx, evalStep, reduceCtorEq] at h
    | Sum.inr x' => by
        simp only [evalStep, hx, Sum.inr.injEq] at h
        rw [←h]
        exact .red_tail _ _ _ (evalStep_right_correct _ _ hx)
  | K ⬝ x, a, h =>
    match hx : x.evalStep with
    | Sum.inl _ => by simp only [hx, evalStep, reduceCtorEq] at h
    | Sum.inr x' => by
        simp only [evalStep, hx, Sum.inr.injEq] at h
        rw [←h]
        exact .red_tail _ _ _ (evalStep_right_correct _ _ hx)
  | I ⬝ x, a, h => Sum.inr.inj h ▸ red_I _
  | S ⬝ x ⬝ y, a, h =>
      match hx : x.evalStep, hy : y.evalStep with
      | Sum.inl _, Sum.inl _ => by simp only [hx, hy, evalStep, reduceCtorEq] at h
      | Sum.inl _, Sum.inr y' => by
          simp only [hx, hy, evalStep, Sum.inr.injEq] at h
          rw [←h]
          exact .red_tail _ _ _ <| evalStep_right_correct _ _ hy
      | Sum.inr x', _ => by
          simp only [hx, hy, evalStep, Sum.inr.injEq] at h
          rw [←h]
          exact .red_head _ _ _ <| .red_tail _ _ _ <| evalStep_right_correct _ _ hx
  | K ⬝ x ⬝ y, a, h => Sum.inr.inj h ▸ red_K ..
  | I ⬝ x ⬝ y, a, h => Sum.inr.inj h ▸ (red_head _ _ _ <| red_I _)
  | S ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ z, a, h => Sum.inr.inj h ▸ red_S ..
  | K ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ z, a, h => Sum.inr.inj h ▸ (red_head _ _ _ <| red_K ..)
  | I ⬝ x ⬝ y ⬝ z, a, h => Sum.inr.inj h ▸ (red_head _ _ _ <| red_head _ _ _ <| red_I _)
  | a ⬝ b ⬝ c ⬝ d ⬝ e, x, h =>
      match habcd : evalStep (a ⬝ b ⬝ c ⬝ d), he : evalStep e with
      | Sum.inl _, Sum.inl _ => by simp only [habcd, he, evalStep, reduceCtorEq] at h
      | Sum.inl _, Sum.inr e' => by
          simp only [habcd, he, evalStep, Sum.inr.injEq] at h
          rw [←h]
          exact red_tail _ _ _ <| evalStep_right_correct _ _ he
      | Sum.inr abcd', _ => by
          simp only [habcd, he, evalStep, Sum.inr.injEq] at h
          rw [←h]
          exact red_head _ _ _ <| evalStep_right_correct _ _ habcd

statement: theorem redexFree_of_normal_red {x : SKI} (h : Normal Red x) : x.RedexFree :=
proof_text:
by
  match hx : x.evalStep with
  | Sum.inl h' => exact h'.down
  | Sum.inr y => rw [Normal_iff] at h; cases h _ (evalStep_right_correct x y hx)

statement: theorem RedexFree.normal_red {x : SKI} (hx : x.RedexFree) : Normal Red x :=
proof_text:
by
  simp_rw [Normal_iff]
  intro y hy
  match x, hx, y, hy with
  | S ⬝ x, hx, S ⬝ y, red_tail _ _ _ hx' => rw [RedexFree] at hx; exact hx.normal_red ⟨_, hx'⟩
  | K ⬝ x, hx, K ⬝ y, red_tail _ _ _ hx' => rw [RedexFree] at hx; exact hx.normal_red ⟨_, hx'⟩
  | S ⬝ _ ⬝ _, ⟨hx, _⟩, S ⬝ _ ⬝ _, red_head _ _ _ (red_tail _ _ _ h3) => exact hx.normal_red ⟨_, h3⟩
  | S ⬝ _ ⬝ _, ⟨_, hy⟩, S ⬝ _ ⬝ _, red_tail _ _ _ h3 => exact hy.normal_red ⟨_, h3⟩
  | _ ⬝ _ ⬝ _ ⬝ _ ⬝ _, ⟨hx, _⟩, _ ⬝ _, red_head _ _ _ hq => exact hx.normal_red ⟨_, hq⟩
  | _ ⬝ _ ⬝ _ ⬝ _ ⬝ _, ⟨_, hy⟩, _ ⬝ _, red_tail _ _ _ he => exact hy.normal_red ⟨_, he⟩

statement: theorem redexFree_iff {x : SKI} : x.RedexFree ↔ Normal Red x :=
proof_text: ⟨RedexFree.normal_red, redexFree_of_normal_red⟩

statement: theorem redexFree_iff_evalStep {x : SKI} : x.RedexFree ↔ (x.evalStep).isLeft = true :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  case mp =>
    intro h
    match hx : x.evalStep with
    | Sum.inl h' => exact rfl
    | Sum.inr y => cases h.normal_red ⟨_, (evalStep_right_correct _ _ hx)⟩
  case mpr =>
    intro h
    match hx : x.evalStep with
    | Sum.inl h' => exact h'.down
    | Sum.inr y => rw [hx] at h; cases h

statement: theorem redexFree_iff_mred_eq {x : SKI} : x.RedexFree ↔ ∀ y, (x ↠ y) ↔ x = y :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  case mp => grind [RedexFree.normal_red]
  case mpr =>
    intro h
    rw [redexFree_iff]
    intro ⟨y, hy⟩
    specialize h y
    exact Red.ne hy (h.1 (Relation.ReflTransGen.single hy))

statement: theorem mJoin_red_redexFree {x y : SKI} (hy : y.RedexFree) (h : MJoin Red x y) : x ↠ y :=
proof_text:
let ⟨w, hyw, hzw⟩ := h
  (redexFree_iff_mred_eq.1 hy _ |>.1 hzw : y = w) ▸ hyw

statement: lemma confluent_redexFree {x y z : SKI} (hxy : x ↠ y) (hxz : x ↠ z) (hz : RedexFree z) : y ↠ z :=
proof_text:
let ⟨w, hyw, hzw⟩ := MRed.diamond hxy hxz
  (redexFree_iff_mred_eq.1 hz _ |>.1 hzw : z = w) ▸ hyw

statement:
lemma unique_normal_form {x y z : SKI}
    (hxy : x ↠ y) (hxz : x ↠ z) (hy : y.RedexFree) (hz : RedexFree z) : y = z :=
proof_text: (redexFree_iff_mred_eq.1 hy _).1 (confluent_redexFree hxy hxz hz)

statement:
lemma eq_of_mJoin_red_redexFree {x y : SKI} (h : MJoin Red x y)
    (hx : x.RedexFree) (hy : y.RedexFree) : x = y :=
proof_text: (redexFree_iff_mred_eq.1 hx _).1 (mJoin_red_redexFree hy h)

statement: lemma sk_nequiv : ¬ MJoin Red S K :=
proof_text:
by
  intro ⟨z, hsz, hkz⟩
  have hS : RedexFree S := by simp [RedexFree]
  have hK : RedexFree K := by simp [RedexFree]
  cases (redexFree_iff_mred_eq.1 hS z).1 hsz
  cases (redexFree_iff_mred_eq.1 hK _).1 hkz

statement:
theorem isBool_injective (x y : SKI) (u v : Bool) (hx : IsBool u x) (hy : IsBool v y)
    (hxy : MJoin Red x y) : u = v :=
proof_text:
by
  have h : MJoin Red (if u then S else K) (if v then S else K) := by
    apply mJoin_red_equivalence.trans (y := x ⬝ S ⬝ K)
    · apply mJoin_red_equivalence.symm
      apply Relation.MJoin.single
      exact hx S K
    · apply mJoin_red_equivalence.trans (y := y ⬝ S ⬝ K)
      · exact mJoin_red_head K <| mJoin_red_head S hxy
      · apply Relation.MJoin.single
        exact hy S K
  grind [sk_nequiv, mJoin_red_equivalence.symm h]

statement: lemma TF_nequiv : ¬ MJoin Red TT FF :=
proof_text:
fun h =>
  (Bool.eq_not_self true).mp <| isBool_injective TT FF true false TT_correct FF_correct h

statement: lemma churchK_church : (n : Nat) → churchK n = Church n K K
proof_text:
| 0 => rfl
  | n+1 => by simp [churchK, Church, churchK_church n]

statement: lemma churchK_redexFree : (n : Nat) → RedexFree (churchK n)
proof_text:
| 0 => trivial
  | n+1 => churchK_redexFree n

statement:
@[simp]
lemma churchK_size : (n : Nat) → (churchK n).size = n+1
proof_text:
| 0 => rfl
  | n + 1 => by rw [churchK, size, size, churchK_size, Nat.add_comm]

statement: lemma churchK_injective : Function.Injective churchK :=
proof_text: fun n m h => by simpa using congrArg SKI.size h

statement:
theorem isChurch_injective (x y : SKI) (n m : Nat) (hx : IsChurch n x) (hy : IsChurch m y)
    (hxy : MJoin Red x y) : n = m :=
proof_text:
by
  suffices MJoin Red (churchK n) (churchK m) by
    apply churchK_injective
    exact eq_of_mJoin_red_redexFree this (churchK_redexFree n) (churchK_redexFree m)
  apply mJoin_red_equivalence.trans (y := x ⬝ K ⬝ K)
  · simp_rw [churchK_church]
    exact mJoin_red_equivalence.symm <| Relation.MJoin.single (hx K K)
  · apply mJoin_red_equivalence.trans (y := y ⬝ K ⬝ K)
    · apply mJoin_red_head; apply mJoin_red_head; assumption
    · simp_rw [churchK_church]
      exact Relation.MJoin.single (hy K K)

statement:
theorem rice {P : SKI} (hP : ∀ x : SKI, ((P ⬝ x) ↠ TT) ∨ (P ⬝ x) ↠ FF)
    (hxt : ∃ x : SKI, (P ⬝ x) ↠ TT) (hxf : ∃ x : SKI, (P ⬝ x) ↠ FF) : False :=
proof_text:
by
  obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hxt
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := hxf
  let Neg : SKI := P ⬝' &0 ⬝' b ⬝' a |>.toSKI (n := 1)
  let Abs : SKI := Neg.fixedPoint
  have Neg_app : ∀ x : SKI, (Neg ⬝ x) ↠ P ⬝ x ⬝ b ⬝ a :=
    fun x => (P ⬝' &0 ⬝' b ⬝' a) |>.toSKI_correct (n := 1) [x] (by simp)
  cases hP Abs
  case inl h =>
    have : (P ⬝ Abs) ↠ FF := calc
      _ ↠ P ⬝ (Neg ⬝ Abs) := by apply MRed.tail; apply fixedPoint_correct
      _ ↠ P ⬝ (P ⬝ Abs ⬝ b ⬝ a) := by apply MRed.tail; apply Neg_app
      _ ↠ P ⬝ (TT ⬝ b ⬝ a) := by apply MRed.tail; apply MRed.head; apply MRed.head; exact h
      _ ↠ P ⬝ b := by apply MRed.tail; apply TT_correct
      _ ↠ FF := hb
    exact TF_nequiv <| MRed.diamond h this
  case inr h =>
    have : (P ⬝ Abs) ↠ TT := calc
      _ ↠ P ⬝ (Neg ⬝ Abs) := by apply MRed.tail; apply fixedPoint_correct
      _ ↠ P ⬝ (P ⬝ Abs ⬝ b ⬝ a) := by apply MRed.tail; apply Neg_app
      _ ↠ P ⬝ (FF ⬝ b ⬝ a) := by apply MRed.tail; apply MRed.head; apply MRed.head; exact h
      _ ↠ P ⬝ a := by apply MRed.tail; apply FF_correct
      _ ↠ TT := ha
    exact TF_nequiv <| MRed.diamond this h

statement:
theorem rice' {P : SKI} (hP : ∀ x : SKI, ((P ⬝ x) ↠ TT) ∨ (P ⬝ x) ↠ FF) :
    (∀ x : SKI, (P ⬝ x) ↠ TT) ∨ (∀ x : SKI, (P ⬝ x) ↠ FF) :=
proof_text:
by
  by_contra! h
  obtain ⟨⟨a, ha⟩, b, hb⟩ := h
  exact rice hP ⟨b, (hP _).resolve_right hb⟩ ⟨a, (hP _).resolve_left ha⟩

statement: @[simp] lemma Church_zero (f x : SKI) : Church 0 f x = x :=
proof_text: rfl

statement: @[simp] lemma Church_succ (n : Nat) (f x : SKI) : Church (n+1) f x = f ⬝ Church n f x :=
proof_text: rfl

statement:
lemma church_red (n : Nat) (f f' x x' : SKI) (hf : f ↠ f') (hx : x ↠ x') :
    Church n f x ↠ Church n f' x' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction n with
  | zero => exact hx
  | succ n ih => exact parallel_mRed hf ih

statement:
theorem isChurch_trans (n : Nat) {a a' : SKI} (h : a ↠ a') :
    IsChurch n a' → IsChurch n a :=
proof_text:
by
  simp_rw [IsChurch]
  intro ha' f x
  calc
  _ ↠ a' ⬝ f ⬝ x := by apply MRed.head; apply MRed.head; exact h
  _ ↠ Church n f x := by apply ha'

statement: theorem zero_correct : IsChurch 0 SKI.Zero :=
proof_text:
by
  unfold IsChurch SKI.Zero Church
  intro f x
  calc
  _ ↠ I ⬝ x := by apply Relation.ReflTransGen.single; apply red_head; apply red_K
  _ ⭢ x := by apply red_I

statement: theorem one_correct : IsChurch 1 SKI.One :=
proof_text:
by
  intro f x
  apply head
  exact .single (red_I f)

statement:
theorem succ_correct (n : Nat) (a : SKI) (h : IsChurch n a) :
    IsChurch (n+1) (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) :=
proof_text:
by
  intro f x
  calc
  _ ⭢ B ⬝ f ⬝ (a ⬝ f) ⬝ x := by apply red_head; apply red_S
  _ ↠ f ⬝ (a ⬝ f ⬝ x) := by apply B_def
  _ ↠ f ⬝ (Church n  f x) := by apply MRed.tail; exact h f x

statement: @[simp] lemma toChurch_zero : toChurch 0 = SKI.Zero :=
proof_text: rfl

statement: @[simp] lemma toChurch_succ (n : ℕ) : toChurch (n + 1) = SKI.Succ ⬝ (toChurch n) :=
proof_text: rfl

statement: theorem toChurch_correct (n : ℕ) : IsChurch n (toChurch n) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction n with
  | zero => exact zero_correct
  | succ n ih => exact succ_correct n (toChurch n) ih

statement: theorem predAux_def (p : SKI) :  (PredAux ⬝ p) ↠ MkPair ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p) ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p)) :=
proof_text: PredAuxPoly.toSKI_correct [p] (by simp)

statement:
theorem isChurchPair_trans (ns : Nat × Nat) (a a' : SKI) (h : a ↠ a') :
    IsChurchPair ns a' → IsChurchPair ns a :=
proof_text:
by
  simp_rw [IsChurchPair]
  intro ⟨ha₁,ha₂⟩
  constructor
  · apply isChurch_trans (a' := Fst ⬝ a')
    · apply MRed.tail; exact h
    · exact ha₁
  · apply isChurch_trans (a' := Snd ⬝ a')
    · apply MRed.tail; exact h
    · exact ha₂

statement:
theorem predAux_correct (p : SKI) (ns : Nat × Nat) (h : IsChurchPair ns p) :
    IsChurchPair ⟨ns.2, ns.2+1⟩ (PredAux ⬝ p) :=
proof_text:
by
  refine isChurchPair_trans _ _ (MkPair ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p) ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ (Snd ⬝ p))) (predAux_def p) ?_
  constructor
  · exact isChurch_trans ns.2 (fst_correct _ _) h.2
  · refine isChurch_trans (ns.2+1) (snd_correct _ _) ?_
    exact succ_correct ns.2 (Snd ⬝ p) h.2

statement:
theorem predAux_correct' (n : Nat) :
    IsChurchPair (n.pred, n) <| Church n PredAux  (MkPair ⬝ SKI.Zero ⬝ SKI.Zero) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction n with
    | zero =>
      apply isChurchPair_trans ⟨0,0⟩ _ (MkPair ⬝ SKI.Zero ⬝ SKI.Zero)
        (by rfl)
      constructor <;> apply isChurch_trans 0 ?_ zero_correct
      · exact fst_correct _ _
      · exact snd_correct _ _
    | succ n ih =>
      simp_rw [Church_succ]
      apply predAux_correct (ns := ⟨n.pred, n⟩) (h := ih)

statement: theorem pred_def (a : SKI) : (Pred ⬝ a) ↠ Fst ⬝ (a ⬝ PredAux ⬝ (MkPair ⬝ SKI.Zero ⬝ SKI.Zero)) :=
proof_text: PredPoly.toSKI_correct [a] (by simp)

statement: theorem pred_correct (n : Nat) (a : SKI) (h : IsChurch n a) : IsChurch n.pred (Pred ⬝ a) :=
proof_text:
by
  refine isChurch_trans n.pred
    (pred_def a) ?_
  refine isChurch_trans _ (a' := Fst ⬝ (Church n PredAux (MkPair ⬝ SKI.Zero ⬝ SKI.Zero))) ?_ ?_
  · apply MRed.tail
    exact h _ _
  · exact predAux_correct' n |>.1

statement: theorem isZero_def (a : SKI) : (IsZero ⬝ a) ↠ a ⬝ (K ⬝ FF) ⬝ TT :=
proof_text: IsZeroPoly.toSKI_correct [a] (by simp)

statement:
theorem isZero_correct (n : Nat) (a : SKI) (h : IsChurch n a) :
    IsBool (n = 0) (IsZero ⬝ a) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isBool_trans (a' := a ⬝ (K ⬝ FF) ⬝ TT) (h := isZero_def a)
  by_cases n=0
  case pos h0 =>
    simp_rw [h0]
    rw [h0] at h
    apply isBool_trans (ha' := TT_correct)
    exact h _ _
  case neg h0 =>
    simp_rw [h0]
    let ⟨k,hk⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_succ_of_ne_zero h0
    rw [hk] at h
    apply isBool_trans (ha' := FF_correct)
    calc
    _ ↠ (K ⬝ FF) ⬝ Church k (K ⬝ FF) TT := h _ _
    _ ⭢ FF := red_K _ _

statement:
theorem recAux_def (R₀ x g a : SKI) :
    (RecAux ⬝ R₀ ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ a) ↠
      SKI.Cond ⬝ x ⬝ (g ⬝ a ⬝ (R₀ ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ a)  :=
proof_text: RecAuxPoly.toSKI_correct [R₀, x, g, a] (by simp)

statement:
theorem rec_def (x g a : SKI) :
    (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ a) ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ x ⬝ (g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ a) :=
proof_text:
calc
  _ ↠ RecAux ⬝ Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ a := by
      apply MRed.head; apply MRed.head; apply MRed.head
      apply fixedPoint_correct
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ x ⬝ (g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ a) := recAux_def Rec x g a

statement: theorem rec_zero (x g a : SKI) (ha : IsChurch 0 a) : (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ a) ↠ x :=
proof_text:
by
  calc
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ x ⬝ (g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ a) := rec_def _ _ _
  _ ↠ if (Nat.beq 0 0) then x else (g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) := by
      apply cond_correct
      exact isZero_correct 0 a ha

statement:
theorem rec_succ (n : Nat) (x g a : SKI) (ha : IsChurch (n + 1) a) :
    (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ a) ↠ g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a)) :=
proof_text:
by
  calc
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ x ⬝ (g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ a) := rec_def _ _ _
  _ ↠ if (Nat.beq (n+1) 0) then x else (g ⬝ a ⬝ (Rec ⬝ x ⬝ g ⬝ (Pred ⬝ a))) := by
      apply cond_correct
      exact isZero_correct (n+1) a ha

statement:
lemma rfindAboveAux_def (R₀ f a : SKI) :
    (RFindAboveAux ⬝ R₀ ⬝ a ⬝ f) ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ a ⬝ (R₀ ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) ⬝ f) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ (f ⬝ a)) :=
proof_text: RFindAboveAuxPoly.toSKI_correct [R₀, a, f] (by trivial)

statement:
theorem rfindAboveAux_base (R₀ f a : SKI) (hfa : IsChurch 0 (f ⬝ a)) :
    (RFindAboveAux ⬝ R₀ ⬝ a ⬝ f) ↠ a :=
proof_text:
calc
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ a ⬝ (R₀ ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) ⬝ f) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ (f ⬝ a)) := rfindAboveAux_def _ _ _
  _ ↠ if (Nat.beq 0 0) then a else (R₀ ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) ⬝ f) := by
      apply cond_correct
      apply isZero_correct _ _ hfa

statement:
theorem rfindAboveAux_step (R₀ f a : SKI) {m : Nat} (hfa : IsChurch (m + 1) (f ⬝ a)) :
    (RFindAboveAux ⬝ R₀ ⬝ a ⬝ f) ↠ R₀ ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) ⬝ f :=
proof_text:
calc
  _ ↠ SKI.Cond ⬝ a ⬝ (R₀ ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) ⬝ f) ⬝ (IsZero ⬝ (f ⬝ a)) := rfindAboveAux_def _ _ _
  _ ↠ if (Nat.beq (m+1) 0) then a else (R₀ ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ a) ⬝ f) := by
      apply cond_correct
      apply isZero_correct _ _ hfa

statement:
theorem RFindAbove_correct (fNat : Nat → Nat) (f x : SKI)
    (hf : ∀ i : Nat, ∀ y : SKI, IsChurch i y →  IsChurch (fNat i) (f ⬝ y))
    (n m : Nat) (hx : IsChurch m x) (hroot : fNat (m+n) = 0) (hpos : ∀ i < n, fNat (m+i) ≠ 0) :
    IsChurch (m+n) (RFindAbove ⬝ x ⬝ f) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction n generalizing m x
  all_goals apply isChurch_trans (a' := RFindAboveAux ⬝ RFindAbove ⬝ x ⬝ f)
  case zero.a =>
    apply isChurch_trans (a' := x) <;>
      grind [rfindAboveAux_base]
  case succ.a n ih =>
    apply isChurch_trans (a' := RFindAbove ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ x) ⬝ f)
    · let y := (fNat m).pred
      have : IsChurch (y + 1) (f ⬝ x) := by
        subst y
        exact Nat.succ_pred_eq_of_ne_zero (hpos 0 (by simp)) ▸ hf m x hx
      apply rfindAboveAux_step
      assumption
    · replace ih := ih (SKI.Succ ⬝ x) (m + 1) (succ_correct _ x hx)
      grind
  all_goals {apply MRed.head; apply MRed.head; exact fixedPoint_correct _}

statement:
theorem RFind_correct (fNat : Nat → Nat) (f : SKI)
    (hf : ∀ (i : Nat) (y : SKI), IsChurch i y → IsChurch (fNat i) (f ⬝ y))
    (n : Nat) (hroot : fNat n = 0) (hpos : ∀ i < n, fNat i ≠ 0) : IsChurch n (RFind ⬝ f) :=
proof_text:
by
  have :_ := RFindAbove_correct (n := n) (fNat := fNat) (hf := hf) (hx := zero_correct)
  simp_rw [Nat.zero_add] at this
  exact this hroot hpos

statement: theorem add_def (a b : SKI) : (SKI.Add ⬝ a ⬝ b) ↠ a ⬝ SKI.Succ ⬝ b :=
proof_text: AddPoly.toSKI_correct [a, b] (by simp)

statement:
theorem add_correct (n m : Nat) (a b : SKI) (ha : IsChurch n a) (hb : IsChurch m b) :
    IsChurch (n + m) (SKI.Add ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  refine isChurch_trans (n + m) (a' := Church n SKI.Succ b) ?_ ?_
  · calc
    _ ↠ a ⬝ SKI.Succ ⬝ b := add_def a b
    _ ↠ Church n SKI.Succ b := ha SKI.Succ b
  · clear ha
    induction n with
      | zero => simp_rw [Nat.zero_add, Church]; exact hb
      | succ n ih =>
        simp_rw [Nat.add_right_comm, Church]
        exact succ_correct _ _ ih

statement: theorem mul_def (a b : SKI) : (SKI.Mul ⬝ a ⬝ b) ↠ a ⬝ (SKI.Add ⬝ b) ⬝ SKI.Zero :=
proof_text: MulPoly.toSKI_correct [a, b] (by simp)

statement:
theorem mul_correct {n m : Nat} {a b : SKI} (ha : IsChurch n a) (hb : IsChurch m b) :
    IsChurch (n * m) (SKI.Mul ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  refine isChurch_trans (n * m) (a' := Church n (SKI.Add ⬝ b) SKI.Zero) ?_ ?_
  · exact Trans.trans (mul_def a b) (ha (SKI.Add ⬝ b) SKI.Zero)
  · clear ha
    induction n with
      | zero => simp_rw [Nat.zero_mul, Church]; exact zero_correct
      | succ n ih =>
        simp_rw [Nat.add_mul, Nat.one_mul, Nat.add_comm, Church]
        exact add_correct m (n * m) b (Church n (SKI.Add ⬝ b) SKI.Zero) hb ih

statement: theorem sub_def (a b : SKI) : (SKI.Sub ⬝ a ⬝ b) ↠ b ⬝ Pred ⬝ a :=
proof_text: SubPoly.toSKI_correct [a, b] (by simp)

statement:
theorem sub_correct (n m : Nat) (a b : SKI) (ha : IsChurch n a) (hb : IsChurch m b) :
    IsChurch (n - m) (SKI.Sub ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  refine isChurch_trans (n - m) (a' := Church m Pred a) ?_ ?_
  · calc
    _ ↠ b ⬝ Pred ⬝ a := sub_def a b
    _ ↠ Church m Pred a := hb Pred a
  · clear hb
    induction m with
      | zero => simp_rw [Nat.sub_zero, Church]; exact ha
      | succ m ih =>
        simp_rw [←Nat.sub_sub, Church]
        exact pred_correct _ _ ih

statement: theorem le_def (a b : SKI) : (SKI.LE ⬝ a ⬝ b) ↠ IsZero ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text: LEPoly.toSKI_correct [a, b] (by simp)

statement:
theorem le_correct (n m : Nat) (a b : SKI) (ha : IsChurch n a) (hb : IsChurch m b) :
    IsBool (n ≤ m) (SKI.LE ⬝ a ⬝ b) :=
proof_text:
by
  simp only [← decide_eq_decide.mpr <| Nat.sub_eq_zero_iff_le]
  apply isBool_trans (a' := IsZero ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ a ⬝ b)) (h := le_def _ _)
  apply isZero_correct
  apply sub_correct <;> assumption

statement:
theorem sqrtCond_def (cn ck : SKI) :
    (SqrtCond ⬝ cn ⬝ ck) ↠
      SKI.Cond ⬝ SKI.Zero ⬝ SKI.One ⬝
        (SKI.Neg ⬝ (SKI.LE ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ ck) ⬝ (SKI.Succ ⬝ ck)) ⬝ cn)) :=
proof_text: SqrtCondPoly.toSKI_correct [cn, ck] (by simp)

statement: theorem sqrt_def (cn : SKI) : (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ↠ RFind ⬝ (SqrtCond ⬝ cn) :=
proof_text: SqrtPoly.toSKI_correct [cn] (by simp)

statement:
theorem sqrt_correct (n : Nat) (cn : SKI) (hcn : IsChurch n cn) :
    IsChurch (Nat.sqrt n) (Sqrt ⬝ cn) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isChurch_trans _ (sqrt_def cn)
  apply RFind_correct (fun k => if n < (k + 1) * (k + 1) then 0 else 1) (SqrtCond ⬝ cn)
  · intro i y hy
    apply isChurch_trans _ (sqrtCond_def cn y)
    have hsucc := succ_correct i y hy
    have hle := le_correct _ n _ cn (mul_correct hsucc hsucc) hcn
    have hneg := neg_correct _ _ hle
    apply isChurch_trans _ (cond_correct _ _ _ _ hneg)
    grind
  · simp [Nat.lt_succ_sqrt]
  · grind [Nat.le_sqrt]

statement:
theorem natPair_def (ca cb : SKI) :
    (NatPair ⬝ ca ⬝ cb) ↠
      SKI.Cond ⬝ (SKI.Add ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ cb ⬝ cb) ⬝ ca)
               ⬝ (SKI.Add ⬝ (SKI.Add ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ ca ⬝ ca) ⬝ ca) ⬝ cb)
               ⬝ (SKI.Neg ⬝ (SKI.LE ⬝ cb ⬝ ca)) :=
proof_text: NatPairPoly.toSKI_correct [ca, cb] (by simp)

statement:
theorem natPair_correct (a b : Nat) (ca cb : SKI)
    (ha : IsChurch a ca) (hb : IsChurch b cb) :
    IsChurch (Nat.pair a b) (NatPair ⬝ ca ⬝ cb) :=
proof_text:
by
  simp only [Nat.pair]
  apply isChurch_trans _ (natPair_def ca cb)
  have hcond := neg_correct _ _ (le_correct b a cb ca hb ha)
  apply isChurch_trans _ (cond_correct _ _ _ _ hcond)
  by_cases hab : a < b
  · grind [add_correct _ _ _ _ (mul_correct hb hb) ha]
  · grind [add_correct _ _ _ _ (add_correct _ _ _ _ (mul_correct ha ha) ha) hb]

statement:
theorem natUnpairLeft_def (cn : SKI) :
    (NatUnpairLeft ⬝ cn) ↠
      SKI.Cond ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ cn ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn)))
               ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn)
               ⬝ (SKI.Neg ⬝ (SKI.LE ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn)
                    ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ cn ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn))))) :=
proof_text: NatUnpairLeftPoly.toSKI_correct [cn] (by simp)

statement:
theorem natUnpair_church (n : Nat) (cn : SKI) (hcn : IsChurch n cn) :
    IsChurch (Nat.sqrt n) (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ∧
    IsChurch (n - Nat.sqrt n * Nat.sqrt n)
      (SKI.Sub ⬝ cn ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn))) :=
proof_text:
by
  have hs := sqrt_correct n cn hcn
  exact ⟨hs, sub_correct n _ cn _ hcn (mul_correct hs hs)⟩

statement:
theorem natUnpairLeft_correct (n : Nat) (cn : SKI) (hcn : IsChurch n cn) :
    IsChurch (Nat.unpair n).1 (NatUnpairLeft ⬝ cn) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isChurch_trans _ (natUnpairLeft_def cn)
  obtain ⟨hs, hdiff⟩ := natUnpair_church n cn hcn
  have hcond := neg_correct _ _ (le_correct _ _ _ _ hs hdiff)
  apply isChurch_trans _ (cond_correct _ _ _ _ hcond)
  by_cases h : n - n.sqrt ^ 2 < n.sqrt <;> grind [Nat.unpair]

statement:
theorem natUnpairRight_def (cn : SKI) :
    (NatUnpairRight ⬝ cn) ↠
      SKI.Cond ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn)
               ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ cn ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn)))
                            ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn))
               ⬝ (SKI.Neg ⬝ (SKI.LE ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn)
                    ⬝ (SKI.Sub ⬝ cn ⬝ (SKI.Mul ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn) ⬝ (Sqrt ⬝ cn))))) :=
proof_text: NatUnpairRightPoly.toSKI_correct [cn] (by simp)

statement:
theorem natUnpairRight_correct (n : Nat) (cn : SKI) (hcn : IsChurch n cn) :
    IsChurch (Nat.unpair n).2 (NatUnpairRight ⬝ cn) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply isChurch_trans _ (natUnpairRight_def cn)
  obtain ⟨hs, hdiff⟩ := natUnpair_church n cn hcn
  have hcond := neg_correct _ _ (le_correct _ _ _ _ hs hdiff)
  apply isChurch_trans _ (cond_correct _ _ _ _ hcond)
  grind [Nat.unpair, sub_correct _ _ _ _ hdiff hs]

statement: theorem haswellformed_def (Γ : Context α β) : Γ✓ = Γ.NodupKeys :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement:
@[scoped grind .]
lemma map_val_keys (f) : Γ.keys = (Γ.map_val f).keys :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Γ <;> grind

statement: lemma map_val_mem (mem : σ ∈ Γ.dlookup x) (f) : f σ ∈ (Γ.map_val f).dlookup x :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Γ <;> grind

statement: lemma Typing.preservation (der : Typing Γ t τ) (step : t ⭢βᵛ t') : Typing Γ t' τ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction der generalizing t'
  case app Γ _ σ τ _ _ _ _ _ =>
    cases step
    case appₗ | appᵣ => grind
    case abs der _ _ =>
      have sub : Sub Γ (σ.arrow τ) (σ.arrow τ) := by grind [Sub.refl]
      have ⟨_, _, ⟨_, _⟩⟩ := der.abs_inv sub
      grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv_tm] Var, open_tm_subst_tm_intro, subst_tm, Sub.weaken]
  case tapp Γ _ σ τ σ' _ _ _ =>
    cases step
    case tabs der _ _ =>
      have sub : Sub Γ (σ.all τ) (σ.all τ) := by grind [Sub.refl]
      have ⟨_, _, ⟨_, _⟩⟩ := der.tabs_inv sub
      have ⟨X, mem⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [Ty.fv, fv_ty] Var
      simp at mem
      have : Γ = (Context.map_val (·[X:=σ']) []) ++ Γ := by grind
      rw [open_ty_subst_ty_intro (X := X), open_subst_intro (X := X)] <;> grind [subst_ty]
    case tapp => grind
  case let' Γ _ _ _ _ L der _ ih₁ _ =>
    cases step
    case let_bind red₁ _ => apply Typing.let' L (ih₁ red₁); grind
    case let_body =>
      grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv_tm] Var, open_tm_subst_tm_intro, subst_tm]
  case case Γ _ σ τ _ _ _ L _ _ _ ih₁ _ _ =>
    have sub : Sub Γ (σ.sum τ) (σ.sum τ) := by grind [Sub.refl]
    have : Γ = [] ++ Γ := by rfl
    cases step
    case «case» red₁ _ _ => apply Typing.case L (ih₁ red₁) <;> grind
    case case_inl der _ _ =>
      have ⟨_, ⟨_, _⟩⟩ := der.inl_inv sub
      grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv_tm] Var, open_tm_subst_tm_intro, subst_tm]
    case case_inr der _ _ =>
      have ⟨_, ⟨_, _⟩⟩ := der.inr_inv sub
      grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv_tm] Var, open_tm_subst_tm_intro, subst_tm]
  all_goals grind [cases Red]

statement: lemma Typing.progress (der : Typing [] t τ) : t.Value ∨ ∃ t', t ⭢βᵛ t' :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : [] = Γ at der
  have der' : Typing Γ t τ := by assumption
  induction der <;> subst eq <;> simp only [forall_const] at *
  case var mem => grind
  case app t₁ _ _ t₂ l r ih_l ih_r =>
    right
    cases ih_l l with
    | inl val_l =>
        cases ih_r r with
        | inl val_r =>
            have ⟨σ, t₁, eq⟩ := l.canonical_form_abs val_l
            exists t₁ ^ᵗᵗ t₂
            grind
        | inr red_r =>
            obtain ⟨t₂', _⟩ := red_r
            exists t₁.app t₂'
            grind
    | inr red_l =>
        obtain ⟨t₁', _⟩ := red_l
        exists t₁'.app t₂
        grind
  case tapp σ' der _ ih =>
    right
    specialize ih der
    cases ih with
    | inl val =>
        obtain ⟨_, t, _⟩ := der.canonical_form_tabs val
        exists t ^ᵗᵞ σ'
        grind
    | inr red =>
        obtain ⟨t', _⟩ := red
        exists .tapp t' σ'
        grind
  case let' t₁ σ t₂ τ L der _ _ ih =>
    right
    cases ih der with
    | inl _ =>
        exists t₂ ^ᵗᵗ t₁
        grind
    | inr red =>
        obtain ⟨t₁', _⟩ := red
        exists t₁'.let' t₂
        grind
  case inl der _ ih =>
    cases (ih der) with
    | inl val => grind
    | inr red =>
        right
        obtain ⟨t', _⟩ := red
        exists .inl t'
        grind
  case inr der _ ih =>
    cases (ih der) with
    | inl val => grind
    | inr red =>
        right
        obtain ⟨t', _⟩ := red
        exists .inr t'
        grind
  case case t₁ _ _ t₂ _ t₃ _ der _ _ _ _ ih =>
    right
    cases ih der with
    | inl val =>
        have ⟨t₁, lr⟩ := der.canonical_form_sum val
        cases lr <;> [exists t₂ ^ᵗᵗ t₁; exists t₃ ^ᵗᵗ t₁] <;> grind
    | inr red =>
        obtain ⟨t₁', _⟩ := red
        exists t₁'.case t₂ t₃
        grind
  case sub => grind
  case abs σ _ τ L _ _=>
    left
    constructor
    apply LC.abs L <;> grind [cases Env.Wf, cases Term.LC]
  case tabs L _ _=>
    left
    constructor
    apply LC.tabs L <;> grind [cases Env.Wf, cases Term.LC]

statement:
@[grind →]
lemma wf {Γ : Env Var} {t : Term Var} {τ : Ty Var} (der : Typing Γ t τ) : Γ.Wf ∧ t.LC ∧ τ.Wf Γ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction der <;> let L := free_union Var <;> have ⟨x, nmem⟩ := fresh_exists L
  case tabs ih =>
    cases (ih x (by grind)).left
    grind [LC.tabs L, Ty.Wf.all L]
  case abs ih =>
    cases (ih x (by grind)).left
    grind [LC.abs L, Wf.strengthen]
  case let' => grind [LC.let' L, Ty.Wf.strengthen]
  case case => refine ⟨?_, LC.case L ?_ ?_ ?_, ?_⟩ <;> grind [Ty.Wf.strengthen]
  all_goals grind [of_bind_ty, open_lc, cases Ty.Wf]

statement:
lemma weaken (der : Typing (Γ ++ Δ) t τ) (wf : (Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ).Wf) :
    Typing (Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ) t τ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ Δ = ΓΔ at der
  induction der generalizing Γ
  case' abs => apply abs ((Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ).dom ∪ free_union Var)
  case' tabs => apply tabs ((Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ).dom ∪ free_union Var)
  case' let' der _ => apply let' ((Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ).dom ∪ free_union Var) (der wf eq)
  case' case der _ _ => apply case ((Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ).dom ∪ free_union Var) (der wf eq)
  all_goals
    grind [Wf.weaken, Sub.weaken, Wf.of_env_ty, Wf.of_env_sub, Sub.refl, <= sublist_dlookup]

statement:
lemma weaken_head (der : Typing Δ t τ) (wf : (Γ ++ Δ).Wf) :
    Typing (Γ ++ Δ) t τ :=
proof_text:
by
  have eq : Δ = [] ++ Δ := by rfl
  rw [eq] at der
  grind [Typing.weaken der wf]

statement:
lemma narrow (sub : Sub Δ δ δ') (der : Typing (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ) t τ) :
    Typing (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ⟩ :: Δ) t τ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ = Θ at der
  induction der generalizing Γ
  case var X' _ _ =>
    grind [Env.Wf.narrow, List.perm_nodupKeys, => List.perm_dlookup]
  case' abs  => apply abs (free_union Var)
  case' tabs => apply tabs (free_union Var)
  case' let' der _ => apply let' (free_union Var) (der eq)
  case' case der _ _ => apply case (free_union Var) (der eq)
  all_goals grind [Ty.Wf.narrow, Env.Wf.narrow, Sub.narrow]

statement:
lemma subst_tm (der : Typing (Γ ++ ⟨X, .ty σ⟩ :: Δ) t τ) (der_sub : Typing Δ s σ) :
    Typing (Γ ++ Δ) (t[X := s]) τ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ ⟨X, .ty σ⟩ :: Δ = Θ at der
  induction der generalizing Γ X
  case var σ' _ X' _ _ =>
    have : Γ ++ ⟨X, .ty σ⟩ :: Δ ~ ⟨X, .ty σ⟩ :: (Γ ++ Δ) := perm_middle
    by_cases eq : X = X'
    · #adaptation_note
      
      grind [→ List.mem_dlookup, weaken_head, Env.Wf.strengthen, -append_assoc]
    · grind [Env.Wf.strengthen, => List.perm_dlookup]
  case abs => grind [abs (free_union Var), open_tm_subst_tm_var]
  case tabs => grind [tabs (free_union Var), open_ty_subst_tm_var]
  case let' der _ => grind [let' (free_union Var) (der eq), open_tm_subst_tm_var]
  case case der _ _ =>
    apply case (free_union Var) (der eq) <;> grind [open_tm_subst_tm_var]
  all_goals grind [Env.Wf.strengthen, Ty.Wf.strengthen, Sub.strengthen]

statement:
lemma subst_ty (der : Typing (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ) t τ) (sub : Sub Δ δ δ') :
    Typing (Γ.map_val (·[X := δ]) ++ Δ) (t[X := δ]) (τ[X := δ]) :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub δ'⟩ :: Δ = Θ at der
  induction der generalizing Γ X
  case var σ _ X' _ mem =>
    have := map_subst_nmem Δ X δ
    have := @map_val_mem Var (f := ((·[X:=δ]) : Binding Var → Binding Var))
    grind [Env.Wf.map_subst, → notMem_keys_of_nodupKeys_cons]
  case abs => grind [abs (free_union [Ty.fv] Var), Ty.subst_fresh, open_tm_subst_ty_var]
  case tabs => grind [tabs (free_union Var), open_ty_subst_ty_var, open_subst_var]
  case let' der _ =>
    apply let' (free_union Var) (der eq)
    grind [open_tm_subst_ty_var]
  case case der _ _ =>
    apply case (free_union Var) (der eq) <;> grind [open_tm_subst_ty_var]
  case tapp => grind [Ty.open_subst, Env.Wf.map_subst, Ty.Wf.map_subst, Sub.map_subst]
  all_goals grind [Env.Wf.map_subst, Ty.Wf.map_subst, Sub.map_subst]

statement:
lemma abs_inv (der : Typing Γ (.abs γ' t) τ) (sub : Sub Γ τ (arrow γ δ)) :
     Sub Γ γ γ'
  ∧ ∃ δ' L, ∀ x ∉ (L : Finset Var),
    Typing (⟨x, Binding.ty γ'⟩ :: Γ) (t ^ᵗᵗ .fvar x) δ' ∧ Sub Γ δ' δ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Term.abs γ' t = e at der
  induction der generalizing t γ' γ δ
  case abs τ L _ _ =>
    cases eq
    cases sub
    split_ands
    · assumption
    · exists τ, L
      grind
  case sub Γ _ τ τ' _ _ ih =>
    subst eq
    have sub' : Sub Γ τ (γ.arrow δ) := by grind
    obtain ⟨_, δ', L, _⟩ := ih sub' (by rfl)
    split_ands
    · assumption
    · exists δ', L
  all_goals grind

statement:
lemma tabs_inv (der : Typing Γ (.tabs γ' t) τ) (sub : Sub Γ τ (all γ δ)) :
     Sub Γ γ γ'
  ∧ ∃ δ' L, ∀ X ∉ (L : Finset Var),
     Typing (⟨X, Binding.sub γ⟩ :: Γ) (t ^ᵗᵞ fvar X) (δ' ^ᵞ fvar X)
     ∧ Sub (⟨X, Binding.sub γ⟩ :: Γ) (δ' ^ᵞ fvar X) (δ ^ᵞ fvar X) :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Term.tabs γ' t = e at der
  induction der generalizing γ δ t γ'
  case tabs σ Γ _ τ L der _ =>
    cases sub with | all L' sub =>
    split_ands
    · grind
    · exists τ, L ∪ L'
      intro X _
      have eq : ⟨X, Binding.sub γ⟩ :: Γ = [] ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub γ⟩ :: Γ := by rfl
      grind [narrow]
  case sub Γ _ τ τ' _ _ ih =>
    subst eq
    have sub' : Sub Γ τ (γ.all δ) := by trans τ' <;> grind
    obtain ⟨_, δ', L, _⟩ := ih sub' (by rfl)
    split_ands
    · assumption
    · exists δ', L
  all_goals grind

statement:
lemma inl_inv (der : Typing Γ (.inl t) τ) (sub : Sub Γ τ (sum γ δ)) :
    ∃ γ', Typing Γ t γ' ∧ Sub Γ γ' γ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : t.inl =t at der
  induction der generalizing γ δ <;> grind [cases Sub]

statement:
lemma inr_inv (der : Typing Γ (.inr t) T) (sub : Sub Γ T (sum γ δ)) :
    ∃ δ', Typing Γ t δ' ∧ Sub Γ δ' δ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : t.inr =t at der
  induction der generalizing γ δ <;> grind [cases Sub]

statement:
lemma canonical_form_abs (val : Value t) (der : Typing [] t (arrow σ τ)) :
    ∃ δ t', t = .abs δ t' :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq  : σ.arrow τ = γ at der
  generalize eq' : [] = Γ at der
  induction der generalizing σ τ <;> grind [cases Sub, cases Value]

statement:
lemma canonical_form_tabs (val : Value t) (der : Typing [] t (all σ τ)) :
    ∃ δ t', t = .tabs δ t' :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq  : σ.all τ = γ at der
  generalize eq' : [] = Γ at der
  induction der generalizing σ τ <;> grind [cases Sub, cases Value]

statement:
lemma canonical_form_sum (val : Value t) (der : Typing [] t (sum σ τ)) :
    ∃ t', t = .inl t' ∨ t = .inr t' :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq  : σ.sum τ = γ at der
  generalize eq' : [] = Γ at der
  induction der generalizing σ τ <;> grind [cases Sub, cases Value]

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma Env.Wf.to_ok {Γ : Env Var} (wf : Γ.Wf) : Γ✓ :=

statement: theorem weaken (wf_ΓΘ : σ.Wf (Γ ++ Θ)) (ok_ΓΔΘ : (Γ ++ Δ ++ Θ)✓) : σ.Wf (Γ ++ Δ ++ Θ) :=

statement:
lemma narrow (wf : σ.Wf (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ⟩ :: Δ)) (ok : (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ'⟩ :: Δ)✓) :
    σ.Wf (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ'⟩ :: Δ) :=

  induction wf generalizing Γ with
  | all => apply all (free_union [dom] Var) <;> grind [nodupKeys_cons]
  | _ =>
    #adaptation_note
    
    grind [sublist_dlookup, -append_assoc]

statement:
lemma narrow_cons (wf : σ.Wf (⟨X, Binding.sub τ⟩ :: Δ)) (ok : (⟨X, Binding.sub τ'⟩ :: Δ)✓) :
    σ.Wf (⟨X, Binding.sub τ'⟩ :: Δ) :=

statement: lemma strengthen (wf : σ.Wf (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.ty τ⟩ :: Δ)) : σ.Wf (Γ ++ Δ) :=

statement:
lemma map_subst (wf_σ : σ.Wf (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ⟩ :: Δ)) (wf_τ' : τ'.Wf Δ)
    (ok : (Γ.map_val (·[X:=τ']) ++ Δ)✓) : σ[X:=τ'].Wf <| Γ.map_val (·[X:=τ']) ++ Δ :=
proof_text:

  generalize eq : Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ⟩ :: Δ = Θ at wf_σ
  induction wf_σ generalizing Γ τ' with
  | all => apply all (free_union [dom] Var) <;> grind [open_subst_var]

statement: lemma open_lc (ok_Γ : Γ✓) (wf_all : (Ty.all σ τ).Wf Γ) (wf_δ : δ.Wf Γ) : (τ ^ᵞ δ).Wf Γ :=

by

    let ⟨X, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv, Context.dom] Var
    have : Γ = Context.map_val (·[X:=δ]) [] ++ Γ := by grind

statement:
lemma narrow (wf_env : Env.Wf (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ⟩ :: Δ)) (wf_τ' : τ'.Wf Δ) :

statement:
lemma map_subst (wf_env : Env.Wf (Γ ++ ⟨X, Binding.sub τ⟩ :: Δ)) (wf_τ' : τ'.Wf Δ) :
    Env.Wf <| Γ.map_val (·[X:=τ']) ++ Δ :=

statement:
lemma map_subst_nmem (Γ : Env Var) (X : Var) (σ : Ty Var) (wf : Γ.Wf) (nmem : X ∉ Γ.dom) :
    Γ = Γ.map_val (·[X:=σ]) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction wf <;> grind [Ty.Wf.nmem_fv, Binding.subst_fresh]

statement: lemma semanticMap_saturated (τ : Ty Base) : @Saturated Var (semanticMap τ) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction τ with
  | base => grind [sn_abs_app_multiApp, sn_neutral, open_abs_lc]
  | arrow τ₁ τ₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
    constructor
    · grind [ih₁.neutal_lc (fvar <| fresh {}) (.fvar <| fresh {}) (.fvar <| fresh {}), cases LC]
    · grind [sn_app_left (Var := Var) (N := fvar <| fresh {})]
    · grind
    · intro M N P _ _ _ s _
      grind [ih₂.multiApp M N (s :: P)]

statement: lemma entails_context_empty {Γ : Context Var (Ty Base)} : entails_context [] Γ :=
proof_text:
by
  have := semanticMap_saturated (Var := Var) (Base := Base)
  grind

statement:
lemma entails_context_cons (E : Term.Env Var) (Γ : Context Var (Ty Base))
    (x : Var) (τ : Ty Base) (sub : Term Var)
    (h_fresh : x ∉ E.dom ∪ E.fv ∪ Γ.dom)
    (h_mem : sub ∈ semanticMap τ) :
    entails_context E Γ → entails_context (⟨ x, sub ⟩ :: E) (⟨ x, τ ⟩ :: Γ) :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [multiSubst_fvar_fresh, subst_fresh, multiSubst_preserves_not_fvar]

statement: lemma soundness {Γ : Context Var (Ty Base)} (derivation_t : Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) : entails Γ t τ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction derivation_t with
  | var Γ xσ_mem_Γ => grind
  | @abs σ Γ t τ L HL IH =>
    intro E _ _ s
    have sat_semMap_σ := semanticMap_saturated (Var := Var) σ
    have sat_semMap_τ := semanticMap_saturated (Var := Var) τ
    have := sat_semMap_τ.multiApp (multiSubst E t) s []
    let := multiSubst E t
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| E.dom ∪ free_union [fv, Context.dom, Env.fv] Var
    have := IH (x := x) (E := ⟨x,s⟩ :: E)
    grind [multiSubst_abs, entails_context_cons, multiSubst_open_var]
  | app => grind [multiSubst_app]

statement: theorem strong_norm {t : Term Var} {τ : Ty Base} (der : Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) : SN t :=
proof_text:
by
  apply (semanticMap_saturated τ).sn
  apply (soundness der [] (by grind) entails_context_empty)

statement: lemma stronglyCommute_eta_beta : StronglyCommute (@FullEta Var) FullBeta :=
proof_text:
by
  intro x y₁ y₂ h₁ st_beta
  induction st_beta generalizing y₁
  case base h1_b =>
    cases h1_b
    case beta M N _ _ =>
      cases h₁
      case base h => cases h
      case appL v _ _ =>
        use M ^ v
        grind [step_open_cong_r]
      case appR u st_eta_absM _ =>
        have := step_lc_r st_eta_absM
        cases st_eta_absM
        case base h => use (disch := grind) app u N
        case abs M_eta xs _ =>
          have ⟨_, hz⟩ := fresh_exists (xs ∪ N.fv ∪ M.fv ∪ M_eta.fv)
          use M_eta ^ N
          grind [step_subst_cong_l]
  case appL Z _ N _ _ ih =>
    cases h₁
    case base h => cases h
    case appL _ _ st =>
      use app Z (ih st).choose
      grind [FullEta.redex_app_r_cong]
    case appR z_red _ _ => use (disch := grind) app z_red N
  case appR M _ Z _ _ ih =>
    cases h₁
    case base h => cases h
    case appL z_red _ _ => use (disch := grind) app Z z_red
    case appR _ st _ =>
      use app (ih st).choose M
      grind [FullEta.redex_app_l_cong]
  case abs M N xs st_body_beta ih =>
    cases h₁
    case base h_eta =>
      cases h_eta with | eta =>
        have ⟨w, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
        have st_beta_w : app y₁ (fvar w) ⭢βᶠ N ^ fvar w := by grind [st_body_beta w]
        rcases invert_step_app_fvar st_beta_w with ⟨u', _, st_u⟩ | ⟨u1, _, _⟩
        · use u'
          grind [open_eq_app ?_ (step_not_fv st_u ?_)]
        · use abs u1
          grind [open_injective w N u1]
    case abs S ys st_body_eta =>
      have ⟨w, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
      obtain ⟨K, h_beta, h_eta⟩ := ih w (by grind) (st_body_eta w (by grind))
      use abs (K ^* w)
      constructor
      · cases h_beta with
        | refl => grind [open_close]
        | single => exact .single (Xi.abs {w} (by grind [FullBeta.redex_subst_cong]))
      · rw [open_close w N 0 (by grind)]
        exact FullEta.redex_abs_close h_eta (FullBeta.step_lc_r (st_body_beta w (by grind)))

statement: theorem confluent_beta_eta : Confluent (@FullBetaEta Var) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply join_confluent
  · exact confluence_beta
  · exact stronglyConfluent_eta.toConfluent
  exact symmetric stronglyCommute_eta_beta.toCommute

statement:
lemma open_lc_aux (e : Term Var) (j v i u) (neq : i ≠ j) (eq : e⟦j ↝ v⟧ = e⟦j ↝ v⟧⟦i ↝ u⟧) :
    e = e ⟦i ↝ u⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction e generalizing j i <;> grind

statement: theorem subst_fresh (x : Var) (t sub : Term Var) (nmem : x ∉ t.fv) : t [x := sub] = t :=
proof_text:
by
  induction t <;> grind

statement: lemma open_close (x : Var) (t : Term Var) (k : ℕ) (nmem : x ∉ t.fv) : t = t⟦k ↝ fvar x⟧⟦k ↜ x⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction t generalizing k <;> grind

statement: lemma open_close_var (x : Var) (t : Term Var) (nmem : x ∉ t.fv) : t = (t ^ fvar x) ^* x :=
proof_text: open_close x t 0 nmem

statement:
lemma open_injective (x : Var) (M M') (free_M : x ∉ M.fv) (free_M' : x ∉ M'.fv)
    (eq : M ^ fvar x = M' ^ fvar x) : M = M' :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [open_close x M 0 free_M, open_close x M' 0 free_M']

statement:
lemma swap_open_fvar_close (k n : ℕ) (x y : Var) (m : Term Var) (neq₁ : k ≠ n) (neq₂ : x ≠ y) :
    m⟦n ↝ fvar y⟧⟦k ↜ x⟧ = m⟦k ↜ x⟧⟦n ↝ fvar y⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m generalizing k n <;> grind

statement: lemma close_preserve_not_fvar {k x y} (m : Term Var) (nmem : x ∉ m.fv) : x ∉ (m⟦k ↜ y⟧).fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m generalizing k <;> grind

statement:
lemma open_fresh_preserve_not_fvar {k x y} (m : Term Var) (nmem : x ∉ m.fv) (neq : x ≠ y) :
    x ∉ (m⟦k ↝ fvar y⟧).fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m generalizing k <;> grind

statement:
lemma open_preserve_not_fvar {k x} (m n : Term Var) (nmem_m : x ∉ m.fv) (nmem_n : x ∉ n.fv) :
    x ∉ (m⟦k ↝ n⟧).fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m generalizing k <;> grind

statement:
lemma subst_preserve_not_fvar {x y : Var} (m n : Term Var) (nmem : x ∉ m.fv ∪ n.fv) :
    x ∉ (m [y := n]).fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m <;> grind

statement:
@[scoped grind ←]
lemma close_var_not_fvar_rec (x) (k) (t : Term Var) : x ∉ (t⟦k ↜ x⟧).fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction t generalizing k <;> grind

statement: lemma close_var_not_fvar (x) (t : Term Var) : x ∉ (t ^* x).fv :=
proof_text: close_var_not_fvar_rec x 0 t

statement:
@[scoped grind =_]
lemma open_lc (k t) (e : Term Var) (e_lc : e.LC) : e = e⟦k ↝ t⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction e_lc generalizing k with
  | abs xs e _ _ => grind [open_lc_aux e 0 (fvar (fresh xs)) (k+1) t]
  | _ => grind

statement:
lemma swap_open (k n : ℕ) (t₁ t₂ m : Term Var) (neq : k ≠ n) (h1 : t₁.LC) (h2 : t₂.LC) :
    m⟦n ↝ t₂⟧⟦k ↝ t₁⟧ = m⟦k ↝ t₁⟧⟦n ↝ t₂⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m generalizing k n with grind

statement:
lemma open_eq_app {x : Var} {m n : Term Var} (hw_n : x ∉ n.fv) (hw_m : x ∉ m.fv) (lc_m : LC m)
    (h : n ^ fvar x = app m (fvar x)) : n = app m (bvar 0) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply open_injective x n _ hw_n (by grind)
  grind [open_lc 0 (fvar x) m lc_m]

statement:
@[scoped grind =]
lemma subst_openRec (x : Var) (t : Term Var) (k : ℕ) (u e : Term Var) (lc : LC t) :
    (e⟦ k ↝ u ⟧)[x := t] = e[x := t]⟦k ↝ u [ x := t ]⟧ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction e generalizing k with grind

statement:
lemma subst_open (x : Var) (t : Term Var) (u e : Term Var) (lc : LC t) :
    (e ^ u)[x := t] = e[x := t] ^ u [ x := t ] :=
proof_text: by grind

statement:
theorem subst_open_var (x y : Var) (u e : Term Var) (neq : y ≠ x) (u_lc : LC u) :
    (e ^ fvar x)[y := u] = e[y := u] ^ fvar x :=
proof_text: by grind

statement: theorem subst_lc {x : Var} {e u : Term Var} (e_lc : LC e) (u_lc : LC u) : LC (e [x := u]) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction e_lc
  case' abs => apply LC.abs (free_union Var)
  all_goals grind

statement:
lemma subst_intro (x : Var) (t e : Term Var) (mem : x ∉ e.fv) (t_lc : LC t) :
    e ^ t = (e ^ fvar x) [ x := t ] :=
proof_text: by grind [subst_fresh]

statement: theorem beta_lc {M N : Term Var} (m_lc : M.abs.LC) (n_lc : LC N) : LC (M ^ N) :=
proof_text:
by
  cases m_lc with
  | abs => grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var]

statement:
@[scoped grind =]
lemma open_close_to_subst (m : Term Var) (x y : Var) (k : ℕ) (m_lc : LC m) :
    m ⟦k ↜ x⟧⟦k ↝ fvar y⟧ = m [x := fvar y] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m_lc generalizing k with
  | abs xs t =>
    have ⟨x', _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    grind [
      swap_open, =_ swap_open_fvar_close,
      open_close x' (t⟦k+1 ↜ x⟧⟦k+1 ↝ fvar y⟧) 0, open_close x' (t[x := fvar y]) 0,
      open_fresh_preserve_not_fvar, close_preserve_not_fvar, subst_preserve_not_fvar]
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma close_open (x : Var) (t : Term Var) (k : ℕ) (t_lc : LC t) : t⟦k ↜ x⟧⟦k ↝ fvar x⟧ = t :=
proof_text:
by
  induction t_lc generalizing k with
  | abs _ t _ ih =>
    let z := t⟦k + 1 ↜ x⟧⟦k + 1 ↝ fvar x⟧
    have ⟨y, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    grind [ih y ?_ (k+1), open_injective, swap_open_fvar_close, swap_open]
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma stronglyConfluent_eta : StronglyConfluent (@FullEta Var) :=
proof_text:
by
  intro _ y z h₁ h₂
  suffices ∃ w, ReflGen FullEta y w ∧ ReflGen FullEta z w by grind
  induction h₁ generalizing z
  case base h1_b =>
    cases h1_b
    case eta M _ =>
      cases h₂
      case base => use (disch := grind) M
      case abs _ _ st_body =>
        have ⟨w, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
        have ⟨M', _, _⟩ := invert_step_app_fvar <| st_body w <| by grind
        use M'
        grind [→ Eta.eta, step_not_fv, open_eq_app]
  case appL Z _ N _ _ ih =>
    cases h₂
    case base h => cases h
    case appL _ _ st => use (disch := grind) app Z (ih st).choose
    case appR z_red _ _ => use (disch := grind) app z_red N
  case appR M _ Z _ _ ih =>
    cases h₂
    case base h => cases h
    case appR _ st _ => use (disch := grind) app (ih st).choose M
    case appL z_red _ _ => use (disch := grind) app Z z_red
  case abs _ _ _ st_M_N ih =>
    cases h₂
    case base h =>
      cases h with | eta lc_M =>
      have ⟨w, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
      have ⟨M', _, _⟩ := invert_step_app_fvar <| st_M_N w (by grind)
      use M'
      grind [→ Eta.eta, step_not_fv, open_eq_app]
    case abs N _ st_M_N =>
      have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
      have ⟨w, _⟩ := ih x (by grind) (z := N ^ fvar x) (st_M_N x (by grind))
      use abs (w ^* x)
      grind [close_eta_steps]

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma step_lc_l (step : M ⭢βᶠ M') : LC M :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | abs => constructor; assumption
  | _ => grind

statement: theorem redex_app_l_cong (redex : M ↠βᶠ M') (lc_N : LC N) : app M N ↠βᶠ app M' N :=
proof_text:
by
  induction redex <;> grind

statement: theorem redex_app_r_cong (redex : M ↠βᶠ M') (lc_N : LC N) : app N M ↠βᶠ app N M' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction redex <;> grind

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma invert_step_app_fvar (step : app M (fvar x) ⭢βᶠ N) :
    (∃ M', N = app M' (fvar x) ∧ M ⭢βᶠ M') ∨ (∃ M1, M = abs M1 ∧ N = M1 ^ fvar x) :=
proof_text:
by
  cases step
  case base h => cases h with | beta => exact .inr ⟨_, rfl, rfl⟩
  case appR step_M _ => exact .inl ⟨_, rfl, step_M⟩
  all_goals grind [cases Xi]

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma step_lc_r (step : M ⭢βᶠ M') : LC M' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step
  case abs => constructor; assumption
  all_goals grind

statement: lemma steps_lc_or_rfl {M M' : Term Var} (redex : M ↠βᶠ M') : (LC M ∧ LC M') ∨ M = M' :=
proof_text:
by
  grind

statement:
lemma redex_subst_cong_lc (s s' t : Term Var) (x : Var) (step : s ⭢βᶠ s') (h_lc : LC t) :
    s [ x := t ] ⭢βᶠ s' [ x := t ] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | base => grind [subst_open]
  | abs  => grind [Xi.abs <| free_union Var]
  | _ => grind

statement:
lemma redex_subst_cong (s s' : Term Var) (x y : Var) (step : s ⭢βᶠ s') :
    s [ x := fvar y ] ⭢βᶠ s' [ x := fvar y ] :=
proof_text: redex_subst_cong_lc _ _ _ _ step (.fvar y)

statement: lemma step_not_fv (step : M ⭢βᶠ N) (hw : w ∉ M.fv) : w ∉ N.fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | base h => cases h with | beta => grind [open_preserve_not_fvar]
  | abs =>
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    have := open_close x
    grind [close_preserve_not_fvar, open_fresh_preserve_not_fvar]
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma step_abs_close {x : Var} (step : M ⭢βᶠ M') : M⟦0 ↜ x⟧.abs ⭢βᶠ M'⟦0 ↜ x⟧.abs :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [Xi.abs ∅, redex_subst_cong]

statement: lemma redex_abs_close {x : Var} (step : M ↠βᶠ M') : (M⟦0 ↜ x⟧.abs ↠βᶠ M'⟦0 ↜ x⟧.abs) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step using Relation.ReflTransGen.trans_induction_on
  case refl => rfl
  case single ih => exact Relation.ReflTransGen.single (step_abs_close ih)
  case trans l r => exact Relation.ReflTransGen.trans l r

statement:
theorem step_abs_cong (xs : Finset Var) (cofin : ∀ x ∉ xs, (M ^ fvar x) ⭢βᶠ (M' ^ fvar x)) :
    M.abs ⭢βᶠ M'.abs :=
proof_text:
by
  have ⟨fresh, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
  rw [open_close fresh M 0 ?_, open_close fresh M' 0 ?_]
  all_goals grind [step_abs_close]

statement:
theorem redex_abs_cong (xs : Finset Var) (cofin : ∀ x ∉ xs, (M ^ fvar x) ↠βᶠ (M' ^ fvar x)) :
    M.abs ↠βᶠ M'.abs :=
proof_text:
by
  have ⟨fresh, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
  rw [open_close fresh M 0 ?_, open_close fresh M' 0 ?_]
  all_goals grind [redex_abs_close]

statement:
lemma step_open_cong_l
  (s s' t) (L : Finset Var) (step : ∀ x ∉ L, (s ^ fvar x) ⭢βᶠ (s' ^ fvar x)) (h_lc : LC t) :
    (s ^ t) ⭢βᶠ (s' ^ t) :=
proof_text:
by
  have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
  grind [subst_intro, redex_subst_cong_lc]

statement:
lemma invert_steps_abs {s t : Term Var} (step : s.abs ↠βᶠ t) :
    ∃ (s' : Term Var), s.abs ↠βᶠ s'.abs ∧ t = s'.abs :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | refl => grind
  | tail _ step _ => cases step with grind [step_abs_cong (free_union Var)]

statement:
lemma steps_open_cong_l_abs
  (s s' t : Term Var) (steps : s.abs ↠βᶠ s'.abs) (lc_s : LC s.abs) (lc_t : LC t) :
    (s ^ t) ↠βᶠ (s' ^ t) :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : s.abs = s_abs at steps
  generalize eq' : s'.abs = s'_abs at steps
  induction steps generalizing s s' with
  | refl => grind
  | tail _ step ih =>
    specialize ih s
    cases step with grind [invert_steps_abs, step_open_cong_l (L := free_union Var)]

statement:
lemma step_subst_cong_r {x : Var} (s t t' : Term Var) (step : t ⭢βᶠ t') (h_lc : LC s) :
    (s [ x := t ]) ↠βᶠ (s [ x := t' ]) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction h_lc with
  | fvar y => grind
  | abs => grind [redex_abs_cong (free_union Var)]
  | @app l r =>
     calc
       (l.app r)[x:=t] ↠βᶠ l[x := t].app (r[x:=t']) := by grind
       _               ↠βᶠ (l.app r)[x:=t'] := by grind

statement:
lemma steps_subst_cong_r {x : Var} (s t t' : Term Var) (step : t ↠βᶠ t') (h_lc : LC s) :
    (s [ x := t ]) ↠βᶠ (s [ x := t' ]) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | refl => rfl
  | tail steps step ih => grind [Relation.ReflTransGen.trans, step_subst_cong_r]

statement:
lemma steps_open_cong_abs (s s' t t' : Term Var)
  (step1 : t ↠βᶠ t') (step2 : s.abs ↠βᶠ s'.abs) (lc_t : LC t) (lc_s : LC s.abs) :
    (s ^ t) ↠βᶠ (s' ^ t') :=
proof_text:
by
  cases lc_s with
  | abs L =>
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    rw [subst_intro x t s, subst_intro x t' s']
    · trans (s ^ fvar x)[x:=t']
      · grind [steps_subst_cong_r]
      · grind [=_ subst_intro, steps_open_cong_l_abs]
    all_goals grind

statement: lemma sn_step (t_st_t' : t ⭢βᶠ t') (sn_t : SN t) : SN t' :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [cases SN]

statement: lemma sn_steps (t_st_t' : t ↠βᶠ t') (sn_t : SN t) : SN t' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction t_st_t' with grind [sn_step]

statement: lemma sn_fvar {x : Var} : SN (fvar x) :=
proof_text:
by
  grind only [cases Xi, cases Beta, SN]

statement:
lemma sn_app (t s : Term Var) (sn_t : SN t) (sn_s : SN s)
    (hβ : ∀ {t' s' : Term Var}, t ↠βᶠ t'.abs → s ↠βᶠ s' → SN (t' ^ s')) : SN (t.app s) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction sn_t generalizing s with
  | sn t ht ih_t =>
    induction sn_s with
    | sn s hs ih_s =>
      constructor
      intro u hstep
      cases hstep with
      | base h => cases h; grind
      | appL _ h_s_red => apply ih_s _ h_s_red
                          grind [Relation.ReflTransGen.head]
      | appR _ h_t_red => apply ih_t _ h_t_red _ (SN.sn s hs)
                          grind [Relation.ReflTransGen.head]

statement:
lemma sn_app_left (M N : Term Var) (lc_N : Term.LC N) (sn_MN : SN (M.app N)) :
    SN M :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize Heq : M.app N = P
  rw [Heq] at sn_MN
  induction sn_MN generalizing M N with grind

statement:
lemma sn_app_right (M N : Term Var) (lc_N : Term.LC M) (sn_MN : SN (M.app N)) :
    SN N :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize Heq : M.app N = P
  rw [Heq] at sn_MN
  induction sn_MN generalizing M N with grind

statement: lemma neutral_step (Hneut : Neutral t) (Hstep : t ⭢βᶠ t') : Neutral t' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Hneut generalizing t' with grind only [Neutral, cases Xi, sn_step]

statement: lemma neutral_steps (Hneut : Neutral t) (Hsteps : t ↠βᶠ t') : Neutral t' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Hsteps <;> grind [neutral_step]

statement: lemma sn_neutral (Hneut : Neutral t) : SN t :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Hneut with
  | app => grind [→ neutral_steps, sn_app]
  | _ => grind only [SN, cases Xi]

statement:
lemma sn_abs [DecidableEq Var] [HasFresh Var] {M N : Term Var} (sn_MN : SN (M ^ N)) (lc_N : LC N) :
    SN (abs M) :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize h : (M ^ N) = M_open at sn_MN
  induction sn_MN generalizing M N with
  | sn =>
    constructor
    intro _ h_step
    cases h_step with
    | abs _ H => grind [step_open_cong_l _ _ _ _ H]
    | base _ => contradiction

by
  induction Ps with
  | nil =>
    apply sn_app
    · grind [sn_abs]
    · exact sn_N
    · grind [→ steps_open_cong_abs, open_abs_lc, sn_steps]
  | cons P Ps ih =>
    apply sn_app
    · cases lc_MNPs with grind [sn_app_left]
    · grind [sn_app_right]
    · intro Q' P' hstep1 hstep2
      have ⟨M', N', Ps', h_M_red, h_N_red, h_Ps_red, h_cases⟩ := invert_abs_multiApp_mst hstep1
      rcases h_cases with h_P | ⟨h_st1, h_st2⟩
      · cases Ps' with grind
      · have innerSteps : (M ^ N).multiApp Ps ↠βᶠ (M' ^ N').multiApp Ps' := by
          trans
          · exact steps_multiApp_r h_Ps_red (by grind)
          · apply steps_multiApp_l
            · apply steps_open_cong_abs M M' N N' <;> grind [open_abs_lc]
            · grind [multiApp_steps_lc]
        refine sn_steps ?_ sn_MNPs
        · calc ((M ^ N).multiApp Ps).app P
            _ ↠βᶠ ((M ^ N).multiApp Ps).app P' := by grind
            _ ↠βᶠ Q'.abs.app P' := redex_app_l_cong (.trans innerSteps h_st2) (by grind)
            _ ↠βᶠ Q' ^ P' := by
              rw [Relation.reflTransGen_iff_eq_or_transGen] at ⊢ innerSteps h_st2
              right
              cases lc_MNPs
              refine Relation.TransGen.single (Xi.base (Beta.beta ?_ ?_))
              all_goals grind only [→ step_lc_r]

statement: lemma openRec_bvar : (bvar i')⟦i ↝ s⟧ = if i = i' then s else bvar i' :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma openRec_fvar : (fvar x)⟦i ↝ s⟧ = fvar x :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma openRec_app : (app l r)⟦i ↝ s⟧ = app (l⟦i ↝ s⟧) (r⟦i ↝ s⟧) :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma openRec_abs : M.abs⟦i ↝ s⟧ = M⟦i + 1 ↝ s⟧.abs :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma closeRec_bvar : (bvar i)⟦k ↜ x⟧ = bvar i :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma closeRec_fvar : (fvar x')⟦k ↜ x⟧ = if x = x' then bvar k else fvar x' :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma closeRec_app : (app l r)⟦k ↜ x⟧ = app (l⟦k ↜ x⟧) (r⟦k ↜ x⟧) :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma closeRec_abs : t.abs⟦k ↜ x⟧ = t⟦k + 1 ↜ x⟧.abs :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma subst_bvar : (bvar i : Term Var)[x := n] = bvar i :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma subst_fvar : (fvar x')[x := n] = if x = x' then n else fvar x' :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma subst_app {l r : Term Var} : (app l r)[x := n] = app (l[x := n]) (r[x := n]) :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma subst_abs {M : Term Var} : M.abs[x := n] = M[x := n].abs :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma subst_def (m : Term Var) (x : Var) (n : Term Var) : m.subst x n = m[x := n] :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma step_lc_r (step : M ⭢ηᶠ M') : LC M' :=
proof_text:
by
  refine Xi.step_lc_r ?_ step
  grind

statement: theorem redex_app_l_cong (redex : M ↠ηᶠ M') (lc_N : LC N) : app M N ↠ηᶠ app M' N :=
proof_text:
by
  induction redex <;> grind

statement: theorem redex_app_r_cong (redex : M ↠ηᶠ M') (lc_N : LC N) : app N M ↠ηᶠ app N M' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction redex <;> grind

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma invert_step_app_fvar (step : (app M (fvar x)) ⭢ηᶠ N) :
    ∃ M', N = app M' (fvar x) ∧ M ⭢ηᶠ M' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases step with
  | appR _ step_M => exact ⟨_, rfl, step_M⟩
  | _ => grind [cases Xi]

statement: lemma step_not_fv (step : M ⭢ηᶠ M') (hw : w ∉ M.fv) : w ∉ M'.fv :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | base => grind
  | abs =>
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    have := open_close x
    grind [close_preserve_not_fvar, open_fresh_preserve_not_fvar]
  | _ => grind

statement:
@[scoped grind ←]
lemma eta_subst_fvar {x y : Var} (step : M ⭢ηᶠ M') : M [ x := fvar y ] ⭢ηᶠ M' [ x := fvar y ] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | abs => grind [Xi.abs <| free_union Var]
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma step_abs_close {x} (step : M ⭢ηᶠ M') (lc_M : LC M) : (M ^* x).abs ⭢ηᶠ (M' ^* x).abs :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [Xi.abs ∅]

statement: lemma redex_abs_close {x} (steps : M ↠ηᶠ M') (lc_M : LC M) : (M ^* x).abs ↠ηᶠ (M' ^* x).abs :=
proof_text:
by
  induction steps using Relation.ReflTransGen.head_induction_on
  case refl => exact .refl
  case head b c st_bc _ ih => exact .head (step_abs_close st_bc lc_M) (ih (step_lc_r st_bc))

statement:
theorem redex_abs_cong {M M' : Term Var} (xs : Finset Var)
    (cofin : ∀ x ∉ xs, (M ^ fvar x) ↠ηᶠ M' ^ fvar x) (lc_M : LC M.abs) :
    M.abs ↠ηᶠ M'.abs :=
proof_text:
by
  cases lc_M
  case abs L hL =>
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    rw [open_close x M 0, open_close x M' 0]
    all_goals grind [redex_abs_close (x := x) (cofin x ?_) (hL x ?_)]

statement:
lemma step_subst_cong_r {x : Var} (s t t' : Term Var) (st : t ⭢ηᶠ t') (lc_s : LC s) (lc_t : LC t) :
    s [ x := t ] ↠ηᶠ s [ x := t' ] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction lc_s generalizing t t' with
  | fvar => grind
  | app hl hr ih_l ih_r =>
    trans
    · exact redex_app_l_cong (ih_l t t' st lc_t) (subst_lc hr lc_t)
    · exact redex_app_r_cong (ih_r t t' st lc_t) (subst_lc hl (step_lc_r st))
  | abs L body h_lc_body ih =>
    apply redex_abs_cong (L ∪ {x})
    · intro z
      grind =>
        have : (body ^ fvar z)[x := t] ↠ηᶠ (body ^ fvar z)[x := t']
        finish
    · exact subst_lc (LC.abs L body h_lc_body) lc_t

statement:
lemma steps_subst_cong_r {x : Var} (s t t' : Term Var) (st : t ↠ηᶠ t') (lc_s : LC s) (lc_t : LC t) :
    s [ x := t ] ↠ηᶠ s [ x := t' ] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction st using Relation.ReflTransGen.head_induction_on
  case refl => rfl
  case head _ _ st _ ih => exact .trans (step_subst_cong_r s _ _ st lc_s lc_t) (ih (step_lc_r st))

statement:
lemma step_open_cong_r {s t t' : Term Var} (lc_s : LC s.abs) (lc_t : LC t) (step : t ⭢ηᶠ t') :
    (s ^ t) ↠ηᶠ s ^ t' :=
proof_text:
by
  cases lc_s
  case abs L hL =>
    have ⟨x, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var
    grind [step_subst_cong_r (x := x) (s ^ fvar x) t t' step (hL x ?_) lc_t]

statement:
lemma steps_open_cong_r {s t t' : Term Var} (lc_s : LC s.abs) (lc_t : LC t) (steps : t ↠ηᶠ t') :
    (s ^ t) ↠ηᶠ s ^ t' :=
proof_text:
by
  induction steps using Relation.ReflTransGen.head_induction_on
  case refl => rfl
  case head _ _ st _ ih => exact .trans (step_open_cong_r lc_s lc_t st) (ih (step_lc_r st))

statement:
lemma close_eta_steps (hx_M : x ∉ M.fv) (st_M : ReflGen FullEta (M ^ fvar x) N) :
    ReflGen FullEta M.abs (N ^* x).abs :=
proof_text:
by
  cases st_M with
  | refl => rw [←open_close_var x M hx_M]
  | single st =>
    exact .single (Xi.abs {x} (by grind))

statement:
lemma step_subst_cong_l {x : Var} (s s' N : Term Var) (step : s ⭢ηᶠ s') (lc_N : LC N) :
    s [ x := N ] ⭢ηᶠ s' [ x := N ] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step
  case base h => cases h with | eta lc => exact Xi.base (.eta (subst_lc lc lc_N))
  case abs => grind [Xi.abs <| free_union Var, subst_open_var]
  all_goals grind

statement:
lemma steps_subst_cong_l {x : Var} (s s' N : Term Var) (steps : s ↠ηᶠ s') (lc_N : LC N) :
    s [ x := N ] ↠ηᶠ s' [ x := N ] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction steps with
  | refl => rfl
  | tail _ step ih => grind [step_subst_cong_l]

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma para_lc_l (step : M ⭢ₚ N) : LC M  :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step
  case abs _ _ xs _ ih => exact LC.abs xs _ ih
  case beta => refine LC.app (LC.abs ?_ _ ?_) ?_ <;> assumption
  all_goals grind

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma Parallel.lc_refl (M : Term Var) (lc : LC M) : M ⭢ₚ M :=
proof_text:
by
  induction lc
  all_goals constructor <;> assumption

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma para_lc_r (step : M ⭢ₚ N) : LC N :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step
  case abs _ _ xs _ ih => exact LC.abs xs _ ih
  case beta => refine beta_lc (LC.abs ?_ _ ?_) ?_ <;> assumption
  all_goals grind

statement: lemma step_to_para (step : M ⭢βᶠ N) : M ⭢ₚ N :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | base h =>
    cases h with | beta abs_lc _ =>
    cases abs_lc with | abs xs _ =>
    apply Parallel.beta xs <;> grind
  | abs xs _ _ => apply Parallel.abs xs; grind
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma para_to_redex (para : M ⭢ₚ N) : M ↠βᶠ N :=
proof_text:
by
  induction para
  case fvar => constructor
  case app L L' R R' l_para m_para redex_l redex_m =>
    have : L.app R ↠βᶠ L'.app R := by grind
    grind [ReflTransGen.trans]
  case abs t t' xs _ ih =>
    apply redex_abs_cong xs
    grind
  case beta m m' n n' xs para_ih para_n redex_ih redex_n =>
    have m'_abs_lc : LC m'.abs := by
      apply LC.abs xs
      grind
    calc
      m.abs.app n ↠βᶠ
      m'.abs.app n :=
        redex_app_l_cong (redex_abs_cong xs (fun _ mem ↦ redex_ih _ mem)) (para_lc_l para_n)
      _           ↠βᶠ m'.abs.app n' := by grind
      _           ⭢βᶠ m' ^ n'       := by grind

statement: theorem parachain_iff_redex : M ↠ₚ N ↔ M ↠βᶠ N :=
proof_text:
by
  refine Iff.intro ?chain_redex ?redex_chain <;> intros h <;> induction h <;> try rfl
  case redex_chain redex chain => exact ReflTransGen.tail chain (step_to_para redex)
  case chain_redex para  redex => exact ReflTransGen.trans redex (para_to_redex para)

statement:
@[scoped grind .]
lemma para_subst (x : Var) (pm : M ⭢ₚ M') (pn : N ⭢ₚ N') : M[x := N] ⭢ₚ M'[x := N'] :=
proof_text:
by
  induction pm with
  | beta =>
    rw [subst_open _ _ _ _ (by grind)]
    refine Parallel.beta (free_union Var) ?_ ?_ <;> grind
  | app => constructor <;> assumption
  | abs => grind [Parallel.abs (free_union Var)]
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma para_open_close (x y z) (para : M ⭢ₚ M') : M⟦z ↜ x⟧⟦z ↝ fvar y⟧ ⭢ₚ M'⟦z ↜ x⟧⟦z ↝ fvar y⟧ :=
proof_text: by grind

statement:
lemma para_open_out (L : Finset Var) (mem : ∀ x, x ∉ L → (M ^ fvar x) ⭢ₚ N ^ fvar x)
    (para : M' ⭢ₚ N') : (M ^ M') ⭢ₚ (N ^ N') :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv] Var]

statement: theorem para_diamond : Diamond (@Parallel Var) :=
proof_text:
by
  intros t t1 t2 tpt1
  revert t2
  induction tpt1 <;> intros t2 tpt2
  case fvar x => exact ⟨t2, by grind⟩
  case abs s1 s2' xs mem ih =>
    cases tpt2
    case abs t2' xs' mem' =>
      have ⟨x, qx⟩ := fresh_exists (xs ∪ xs' ∪ free_union [fv] Var)
      simp only [Finset.union_assoc, Finset.mem_union, not_or] at qx
      have ⟨q1, q2, _⟩ := qx
      have ⟨t', _⟩ := ih x q1 (mem' _ q2)
      exists abs (t' ^* x)
      constructor
      <;> [let z := s2' ^ fvar x; let z := t2' ^ fvar x]
      <;> apply Parallel.abs (free_union [fv] Var) <;> grind
  case beta s1 s1' s2 s2' xs mem ps ih1 ih2 =>
    cases tpt2
    case app u2 u2' s1pu2 s2pu2' =>
      cases s1pu2
      case abs s1'' xs' mem' =>
        have ⟨x, qx⟩ := fresh_exists (xs ∪ xs' ∪ free_union [fv] Var)
        simp only [Finset.union_assoc, Finset.mem_union, not_or] at qx
        obtain ⟨q1, q2, _⟩ := qx
        have ⟨t', _⟩ := ih2 s2pu2'
        have ⟨t'', _⟩ := @ih1 x q1 _ (mem' _ q2)
        exists (t'' ^* x) ^ t'
        constructor
        · #adaptation_note
          
          grind [subst_intro]
        · apply Parallel.beta (free_union [fv] Var) <;> grind
    case beta u1' u2' xs' mem' s2pu2' =>
      have ⟨x, qx⟩ := fresh_exists (xs ∪ xs' ∪ free_union [fv] Var)
      simp only [Finset.union_assoc, Finset.mem_union, not_or] at qx
      have ⟨q1, q2, _⟩ := qx
      have ⟨t', _⟩ := ih2 s2pu2'
      have ⟨t'', _⟩ := @ih1 x q1 _ (mem' _ q2)
      refine ⟨t'' [x := t'], ?_⟩
      grind
  case app s1 s1' s2 s2' s1ps1' _ ih1 ih2  =>
    cases tpt2
    case app u1 u2' s1 s2 =>
      have ⟨l, _, _⟩ := ih1 s1
      have ⟨r, _, _⟩ := ih2 s2
      exact ⟨app l r, by grind⟩
    case beta t1' u1' u2' xs mem s2pu2' =>
      cases s1ps1'
      case abs s1'' xs' mem' =>
        have ⟨x, qx⟩ := fresh_exists (xs ∪ xs' ∪ free_union [fv] Var)
        simp only [Finset.union_assoc, Finset.mem_union, not_or] at qx
        obtain ⟨q1, q2, _⟩ := qx
        have ⟨t', qt'_l, qt'_r⟩ := ih2 s2pu2'
        have ⟨t'', qt''_l, qt''_r⟩ := @ih1 (abs u1') (Parallel.abs xs mem)
        cases qt''_l
        next w1 xs'' mem'' =>
        cases qt''_r
        case abs xs''' mem''' =>
          refine ⟨w1 ^ t', ?_, para_open_out xs''' mem''' qt'_r⟩
          apply Parallel.beta (free_union Var) <;> grind

statement: theorem para_confluence : Confluent (@Parallel Var) :=
proof_text: para_diamond.toConfluent

statement: theorem confluence_beta : Confluent (@FullBeta Var) :=
proof_text:
by
  have eq : ReflTransGen (@Parallel Var) = ReflTransGen (@FullBeta Var) := by
    ext
    exact parachain_iff_redex
  rw [Confluent, ←eq]
  exact para_confluence

statement:
theorem Term.rename.eq_sizeOf {m : Term Var} {x y : Var} [DecidableEq Var] :
  sizeOf (m.rename x y) = sizeOf m :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m <;> aesop (add simp [Term.rename])

statement:
theorem Context.complete (m : Term Var) :
    ∃ (c : Context Var) (x : Var), m = (c.fill (Term.var x)) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m with
  | var x => exists hole, x
  | abs x n ih =>
    obtain ⟨c', y, ih⟩ := ih
    exists Context.abs x c', y
    rw [ih, fill]
  | app n₁ n₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
    obtain ⟨c₁, x₁, ih₁⟩ := ih₁
    exists Context.appL c₁ n₂, x₁
    rw [ih₁, fill]

by

by

    ∃ a, (Satisfies lts s1 a ∧ ¬Satisfies lts s2 a) :=
proof_text:
by
  grind [=_ neg_satisfies]

statement:

    (hs : Satisfies lts s1 a) : Satisfies lts s2 a :=
