statement: theorem propositions_complete (s' : lts.image s μ) : stateMap s' ∈ propositions stateMap :=
proof_text:
by
  apply List.mem_map.mpr
  use s', Finset.mem_toList.mpr (Fintype.complete s')

statement:
theorem propositions_satisfies_conjunction (htr : lts.Tr s1 μ s1')
    (hdist_spec : ∀ s2', Satisfies lts s1' (stateMap s2')) :
    Satisfies lts s1 (.diamond μ <| Proposition.finiteAnd (propositions stateMap)) :=
proof_text:
by
  apply Satisfies.diamond htr
  rw [satisfies_finiteAnd]
  intro a ha_mem
  grind [List.mem_map.mp ha_mem]

statement:
theorem theoryEq_isBisimulation (lts : LTS State Label)
    [image_finite : ∀ s μ, Finite (lts.image s μ)] :
    lts.IsHomBisimulation (TheoryEq lts) :=
proof_text:
by
  intro s1 s2 h μ
  let (s : State) := @Fintype.ofFinite (lts.image s μ) (image_finite s μ)
  constructor
  case left =>
    intro s1' htr
    by_contra
    have hdist : ∀ s2' : lts.image s2 μ, ∃ a, Satisfies lts s1' a ∧ ¬Satisfies lts s2'.val a := by
      intro ⟨s2', hs2'⟩
      apply not_theoryEq_satisfies
      grind
    choose dist_formula hdist_spec using hdist
    let conjunction := Proposition.finiteAnd (propositions dist_formula)
    have hs1_diamond : Satisfies lts s1 (.diamond μ conjunction) := by
      grind [propositions_satisfies_conjunction]
    cases (theoryEq_satisfies h hs1_diamond) with | @diamond _ s2'' _ _ htr2 hsat =>
    grind [propositions_complete dist_formula ⟨s2'', htr2⟩]
  case right =>
    intro s2' htr
    by_contra
    have hdist : ∀ s1' : lts.image s1 μ, ∃ a, Satisfies lts s2' a ∧ ¬Satisfies lts s1'.val a := by
      intro ⟨s1', hs1'⟩
      apply not_theoryEq_satisfies
      grind
    choose dist_formula hdist_spec using hdist
    let conjunction := Proposition.finiteAnd (propositions dist_formula)
    have hs2_diamond : Satisfies lts s2 (.diamond μ conjunction) := by
      grind [propositions_satisfies_conjunction]
    cases (theoryEq_satisfies h.symm hs2_diamond) with | @diamond _ s1'' _ _ htr1 hsat =>
    grind [propositions_complete dist_formula ⟨s1'', htr1⟩]

by
  induction a generalizing s1 s2 with
  | diamond => cases hs with | diamond htr _ => grind [hrb.follow_fst hr htr]
  | _ => grind

by
  have : s2 ~[lts] s1 := by grind [Bisimilarity.symm]
  grind

statement:
theorem theoryEq_eq_bisimilarity (lts : LTS State Label)
    [image_finite : ∀ s μ, Finite (lts.image s μ)] :
    TheoryEq lts = HomBisimilarity lts :=
proof_text:
by
  ext s1 s2
  apply Iff.intro <;> intro h
  · exists TheoryEq lts
    grind
  · obtain ⟨r, hr, hrb⟩ := h
    apply bisimulation_TheoryEq hr
    exact hrb

by grind

by
  #adaptation_note
  
  induction a with
  | one => simp +contextual [dual, expand, onlyAtomicAxioms]
  | bot =>
    intro h
    rw [←h]
    congr 1

statement: theorem Proof.expand_onlyAtomicAxioms (a : Proposition Atom) : a.expand.onlyAtomicAxioms :=
proof_text:
by
  #adaptation_note
  
  induction a with
  | one =>
    rw [←dual_involution .one]
    apply expand_onlyAtomicAxioms_dual
    simp [expand, onlyAtomicAxioms, dual]
  | zero =>
    rw [←dual_involution .zero]
    apply expand_onlyAtomicAxioms_dual
    simp [expand, onlyAtomicAxioms, dual]
  | top | bot => simp [expand, onlyAtomicAxioms]
  | _ => grind [Proposition.expand]

by
  induction a <;> simp [dual] <;> grind

statement: theorem Proposition.dual_neq (a : Proposition Atom) : a ≠ a⫠ :=
proof_text:
by
  cases a <;> simp [Proposition.dual]

statement: theorem Proposition.dual_inj (a b : Proposition Atom) : a⫠ = b⫠ ↔ a = b :=
proof_text:
by
  refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, congrArg dual⟩
  induction a generalizing b <;> cases b <;> grind

statement: theorem Proposition.dual_involution (a : Proposition Atom) : a⫠⫠ = a :=
proof_text:
by
  induction a <;> grind [dual]

statement: theorem Proposition.equiv.toProp (h : a ≡⇓ b) : a ≡ b :=
theorem Equiv.refl (a : Proposition Atom) : a ≡ a :=
proof_text: equiv.refl a

statement: theorem Equiv.symm {a b : Proposition Atom} (h : a ≡ b) : b ≡ a :=
theorem Equiv.trans {a b c : Proposition Atom} (hab : a ≡ b) (hbc : b ≡ c) : a ≡ c :=
proof_text: equiv.trans (chooseEquiv hab) (chooseEquiv hbc)

statement: theorem Proposition.isMLL_dual {a : Proposition Atom} (ha : a.IsMLL) : a⫠.IsMLL :=
proof_text:
by
  induction ha <;> grind [dual, IsMLL]

statement:
theorem Proposition.Context.isMLL_fill {c : CLL.Proposition.Context Atom} {a : CLL.Proposition Atom}
    (hc : c.IsMLL) : (c.fill a).IsMLL ↔ a.IsMLL :=
proof_text:
by
  induction c with
  | hole => grind [fill]
  | tensorL | tensorR | parrL | parrR => grind [fill, IsMLL, Proposition.IsMLL]
  | _ => grind [IsMLL]

statement: theorem Proof.isMLL_sequent {Γ : Sequent Atom} {p : ⇓Γ} (h : p.IsMLL) : Γ.IsMLL :=
proof_text:
by
  induction h
  case ax =>
    grind [Proof.IsMLL, Multiset.insert_eq_cons, Multiset.mem_singleton]
  case one =>
    simp [Sequent.IsMLL, Proposition.IsMLL]
  case parr | tensor | cut => grind [Proposition.IsMLL, Proof.IsMLL]
  case bot Γ p ih =>
    simp
    grind [Proof.IsMLL]

statement:
theorem Proof.isMLL_cutFree {Γ : Sequent Atom} (p : ⇓Γ) (hΓ : Γ.IsMLL)
    (hp : p.cutFree) : p.IsMLL :=
proof_text:
by
  induction p
  case ax => simp_all
  case one => simp
  case bot _ _ ih =>
    refine ih ?_ hp
    simpa using hΓ
  case parr a b Γ p ih =>
    refine ih ?_ hp
    simp at hΓ
    grind [Sequent.IsMLL]
  case tensor a b Γ Δ p q ihp ihq =>
    simp at hΓ
    refine ⟨ihp ?mll.p ?cut.p, ihq ?mll.q ?cut.q⟩
    case mll | mll => grind [Sequent.IsMLL]
    case cut | cut => grind [cutFree]
  case oplus₁ | oplus₂ | «with» | top | quest | contract | weaken | bang => simp at hΓ
  case cut => simp [cutFree] at hp

statement: theorem Proof.isMLL_sequent {Γ : Sequent Atom} (p : MLL⇓Γ) : Γ.IsMLL :=
proof_text: CLL.Proof.isMLL_sequent p.property

statement: theorem isIntuitionisticIff [Bot Atom] (T : Theory Atom) : IsIntuitionistic T ↔ IPL ⊆ T :=
proof_text: by grind

statement: theorem isClassicalIff [Bot Atom] (T : Theory Atom) : IsClassical T ↔ CPL ⊆ T :=
proof_text: by grind

statement:
theorem instIsIntuitionisticExtention [Bot Atom] {T T' : Theory Atom} [IsIntuitionistic T]
    (h : T ⊆ T') : IsIntuitionistic T' :=
proof_text: by grind

statement:
theorem instIsClassicalExtention [Bot Atom] {T T' : Theory Atom} [IsClassical T] (h : T ⊆ T') :
    IsClassical T' :=
proof_text: by grind

statement: theorem Theory.Derivation.emptySequent_eq {A : Proposition Atom} : T⇓A = T⇓(∅ ⊢ A) :=
proof_text: rfl

statement:
theorem DerivableIn.iff_derivableIn_empty {A : Proposition Atom} :
    DerivableIn T A ↔ DerivableIn T (∅ ⊢ A) :=
proof_text: by rfl

statement: lemma Theory.Equiv.mp {A B : Proposition Atom} (h : A ≡[T] B) : DerivableIn T ({A} ⊢ B) :=
proof_text: ⟨h.some.mp⟩

statement: lemma Theory.Equiv.mpr {A B : Proposition Atom} (h : A ≡[T] B) : DerivableIn T ({B} ⊢ A) :=
proof_text: ⟨h.some.mpr⟩

statement:
theorem Theory.equiv_iff {A B : Proposition Atom} :
  A ≡[T] B ↔ DerivableIn T ({A} ⊢ B) ∧ DerivableIn T ({B} ⊢ A) :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact ⟨h.mp, h.mpr⟩
  · intro ⟨⟨D⟩, ⟨E⟩⟩
    exact ⟨D, E⟩

statement:
theorem DerivableIn.weak {T T' : Theory Atom} {Γ Δ : Ctx Atom} {A : Proposition Atom}
    (hTheory : T ⊆ T') (hCtx : Γ ⊆ Δ) : DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ A) → DerivableIn T' (Δ ⊢ A)
proof_text: | ⟨D⟩ => ⟨D.weak hTheory hCtx⟩

statement:
theorem DerivableIn.weak_theory {T T' : Theory Atom} {Γ : Ctx Atom} {A : Proposition Atom}
    (hTheory : T ⊆ T') : DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ A) → DerivableIn T' (Γ ⊢ A)
proof_text: | ⟨D⟩ => ⟨D.weak_theory hTheory⟩

statement:
theorem DerivableIn.weak_ctx {T : Theory Atom} {Γ Δ : Ctx Atom} {A : Proposition Atom}
    (hCtx : Γ ⊆ Δ) : DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ A) → DerivableIn T (Δ ⊢ A)
proof_text: | ⟨D⟩ => ⟨D.weak_ctx hCtx⟩

statement:
theorem DerivableIn.cut {Γ Δ : Ctx Atom} {A B : Proposition Atom} :
    DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ A) → DerivableIn T ((insert A Δ) ⊢ B) → DerivableIn T ((Γ ∪ Δ) ⊢ B)

proof_text:
by
  induction Γ' using Finset.induction with
  | empty => exact DerivableIn.weak_ctx (by grind) hDer
  | insert A Δ hA ih =>
    apply ih
    · intro A' hA'
      exact hΔ A' <| Finset.mem_insert_of_mem hA'
    · apply Finset.union_left_idem Γ Δ ▸ DerivableIn.cut (Δ := Γ ∪ Δ)
      · exact hΔ A <| Finset.mem_insert_self A Δ
      · rwa [← Finset.union_insert A Γ Δ]

statement:
theorem DerivableIn.substAtom {Atom Atom' : Type u} [DecidableEq Atom] [DecidableEq Atom']
    {T : Theory Atom}
    (f : Atom → Proposition Atom') {Γ : Ctx Atom} {B : Proposition Atom} :
    DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ B) → DerivableIn (T.subst f) ((Γ.subst f) ⊢ (B >>= f))
proof_text: | ⟨D⟩ => ⟨D.substAtom f⟩

statement: theorem derivableIn_top [Inhabited Atom] : DerivableIn T (⊤ : Proposition Atom) :=
proof_text: ⟨derivationTop⟩

statement:
theorem derivable_iff_equiv_top [Inhabited Atom] (A : Proposition Atom) :
    DerivableIn T A ↔ A ≡[T] ⊤ :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor <;> intro h
  · refine ⟨derivationTop.weak_ctx <| by grind, ?_⟩
    let D := Classical.choice h
    exact D.weak_ctx <| by grind
  · have := DerivableIn.cut (derivableIn_top (T := T)) (B := A) (Δ := ∅)
    rw [←show (∅ : Ctx Atom) = ∅ ∪ ∅ by rfl] at this
    exact this h.mpr

statement:
theorem equiv_iff_equiv_derivableIn {A B : Proposition Atom} :
    A ≡[T] B ↔ ∀ Γ : Ctx Atom, DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ A) ↔ DerivableIn T (Γ ⊢ B) :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  · intro ⟨e⟩ Γ
    exact ⟨fun D => mapEquivConclusion Γ e D.some, fun D => mapEquivConclusion Γ e.symm D.some⟩
  · intro h
    rw [equiv_iff]
    constructor
    · exact (h {A}).mp ⟨ass <| by grind⟩
    · exact (h {B}).mpr ⟨ass <| by grind⟩

statement:
theorem equiv_iff_equiv_derivableIn_hypothesis {A B : Proposition Atom} :
    A ≡[T] B ↔
      ∀ (Γ : Ctx Atom) (C : Proposition Atom),
      DerivableIn T ((insert A Γ) ⊢ C) ↔ DerivableIn T ((insert B Γ) ⊢ C) :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  · intro ⟨e⟩ Γ C
    exact ⟨fun D => mapEquivHypothesis Γ e C D.some, fun E => mapEquivHypothesis Γ e.symm C E.some⟩
  · intro h
    rw [equiv_iff]
    constructor
    · exact (h ∅ B).mpr ⟨ass <| by grind⟩
    · exact (h ∅ A).mp ⟨ass <| by grind⟩

statement: theorem Equiv.refl {T : Theory Atom} (A : Proposition Atom) : A ≡[T] A :=
proof_text:
by
  exact ⟨equiv.refl A⟩

statement:
theorem Equiv.symm {T : Theory Atom} {A B : Proposition Atom} :
    (A ≡[T] B) → B ≡[T] A
proof_text: | ⟨e⟩ => ⟨e.symm⟩

statement:
theorem Equiv.trans {T : Theory Atom} {A B C : Proposition Atom} :
    (A ≡[T] B) → (B ≡[T] C) → A ≡[T] C
proof_text: | ⟨e⟩, ⟨e'⟩ => ⟨e.trans e'⟩

statement: theorem equiv_equivalence (T : Theory Atom) : Equivalence (T.Equiv (Atom := Atom)) :=
proof_text: ⟨Equiv.refl, Equiv.symm, Equiv.trans⟩
